empty.en: Needs more water.

generic.en: Dang ground squirrels...

nitre.en: It's how we built the railway.

hammered.trans: 我变得更厚颜无耻了，嗯？

generic.en: Tacky taxidermy.
generic.trans: 厚颜无耻的动物标本剥制术。

marbletree.en: Even Lucy can't chop that one down.
marbletree.trans: 即使是露西也砍不倒那个。

waterplant_planter.en: Where will you cause the least amount of damage...
waterplant_planter.trans: 你在哪里造成的伤害最小呢……

sketch.en: Some plans for a fancy stone carving.
sketch.trans: 一套雕刻别致石头的计划。

watermelon_cooked.en: I'm not sure aboot grilled fruit...

carnivaldecor_eggride.trans: 那些玩意最好不要孵化。

mutator_healer.en: Sorry little buddy, I think I'll have to pass.
mutator_healer.trans: 对不起，小家伙，俺不吃这玩意。

carnivalgame_puckdrop_kit.en: Those good-for-nothing birds can't even set up their own carnival?
carnivalgame_puckdrop_kit.trans: 那些一无是处的鸟儿们连自己的嘉年华都不会建？

acorn.en: I should grow it and then chop it down!
acorn.trans: 我应该把它种出来，然后再砍倒它！

healingsalve_acid.en: Oh man, that's got a real funk to it.
healingsalve_acid.trans: 哎呦喂，那玩意有股怪味。

record_danger.en: This gets me all fired up.

boaron.en: I feel bad beatin' up such a little thing.
boaron.trans: 揍这些个小东西，我都有点过意不去。

drying_notmeat.en: This is like watching meat dry.
drying_notmeat.trans: 这就像看着肉慢慢变干。

drying.en: This is like watching meat dry.
drying.trans: 这就像看着肉慢慢变干。

dryinginrain_notmeat.en: This is like watching meat dry... in the rain.
dryinginrain_notmeat.trans: 这就像看着肉变干...在雨天里慢慢变干。

dryinginrain.en: This is like watching meat dry... in the rain.
dryinginrain.trans: 这就像看着肉变干...在雨天里慢慢变干。

burnt.trans: 它已经没有利用价值了。

generic.en: Whatcha think, Lucy? Do we have some meat to spare?
generic.trans: 露西你怎么看？咱们要不要给她分点肉？

beehat.en: That'll keep the bees out of yer eyes.
beehat.trans: 这个可以防止蜜蜂蜇你的眼睛。

handpillow_steelwool.en: Still better than one that's stuffed with nasty feathers.
handpillow_steelwool.trans: 总比塞满了讨厌的羽毛的那些要好。

lunarfrog.en: They glow now, eh? Alrighty then.

gunpowder.trans: 从来没有做过这种东西。

spiderhole.en: I should skedaddle before they come out of there.
spiderhole.trans: 我应该在它们出来之前赶紧离开这地方。

yotp_food2.trans: 看起来不是让人很有胃口。对不起。

nonslipgrit.en: I would have made a fortune selling this back home.
nonslipgrit.trans: 要是在老家卖这个就发财了。

slingshot_handle_silk.en: Kid is getting fancy with that slingshooter.
slingshot_handle_silk.trans: 这小子耍弹弓越来越利索了。

yotp_food3.trans: 我不需要花里胡哨的食物。

spiderhole_rock.en: I should skedaddle before they come out of there.
spiderhole_rock.trans: 我应该在它们出来之前赶紧离开这地方。

armorsnurtleshell.en: You can never be too safe.

kitcoon_yot.en: Well yer just too cute, aren'tcha?
kitcoon_yot.trans: 你咋这么让人心疼昵，啊？

boat_rotator_kit.en: Better get it set up on the boat, eh?

warg.en: That thing could pull a sled by its lonesome.
warg.trans: 那东西仅凭一己之力就可以拉动雪橇。

quagmire_coin2.en: I'm gonna buy something nice for Lucy.
quagmire_coin2.trans: 我要给露西买点好东西。

monkeyqueen.en: She doesn't look like the one on the back of the loonie.
monkeyqueen.trans: 她看着不像加元硬币背面的那位。

quagmire_coin1.en: This coin could use a polish.

quagmire_coin4.en: Nothin' like being owed a favour.

carnivaldecor_figure_kit.en: I can't stop wondering what's inside...
carnivaldecor_figure_kit.trans: 我忍不住想知道里面有什么……

quagmire_coin3.en: Not a Looney but I guess it works around here.
quagmire_coin3.trans: 不算什么大钱，但是在这儿也能派上用场。

follower.en: I've got a way with nature.
follower.trans: 我对大自然的东西很有门道。

brokenhorn_follower.trans: 那角的事情真不好意思，兄弟。

generic.en: That thing looks like it could do some damage.
generic.trans: 那东西看起来会做些破坏。

unwritten.en: Let's give our neighbours some guidance.
unwritten.trans: 让我们给邻居一点指引。

burnt.en: Wood is the best at burning.

generic.en: Let the wood guide the way.

yotc_carrat_gym_reaction_item.en: Better find a good place to put this, eh?
yotc_carrat_gym_reaction_item.trans: 得找个好地方放下它，对不？

steeringwheel.en: I like to know where I'm going.

book_birds.en: I already know more than enough aboot those things.
book_birds.trans: 我已经知道这些事情的太多内幕了。

mast_item.en: Better build it if we don't wanna row all day.

yotc_carrat_scale_item.en: This will help me get the measure of my racer.
yotc_carrat_scale_item.trans: 这个能替我衡量我的选手。

record_main.en: What a nifty number, eh Luce?

barnacle.en: Not my first choice in seafood.

staffcoldlight.en: At least it won't start a forest fire.
staffcoldlight.trans: 至少它不会引起森林大火。

polishcookie.en: Whoops, I think I got some jam in my beard.
polishcookie.trans: 哎呦，胡子上沾到果酱了。

megaflare.en: That'll definitely get someone... or something's attention.
megaflare.trans: 那玩意肯定会引起什么人……或者是什么东西的注意。

oceanfishingbobber_crow.en: Hmph. Guess birds are good for some things.
oceanfishingbobber_crow.trans: 嗯。看来鸟也不是一无是处。

pocketwatch_portal_exit.en: Wish she'd put those over somethin' softer to land on.
pocketwatch_portal_exit.trans: 她应该找个软点的位置放，那样掉下来会舒服点。

mask_mirrorhat.en: There's somethin' funny aboot that mask.

merm_tool.trans: 露西，你听我说。注意礼貌。

slurper_pelt.trans: 看上去像一只死去的海狸。

footballhat.en: Will this give me hockey hair?
footballhat.trans: 这玩意儿会弄乱我的发型吗？

support_pillar_scaffold.en: Needs some more work yet, eh?

burning.en: It's gonna start a forest fire if we're not careful!
burning.trans: 不小心的话，会引发森林大火的!

has_item_light.en: Huh. Seeing it now I guess it's not that impressive.

generic.en: We're up for a bit of friendly competition, aren't we Lucy?
generic.trans: 来个友谊赛也不错，是吧，露西?

tillweedsalve.en: Never hurts to have some of this stuff around.
tillweedsalve.trans: 这东西带点在身上保准没错。

hermitcrabtea_petals.en: Maybe you should have some of this, Luce.
hermitcrabtea_petals.trans: 也许你该喝点这个，露西。

generic.en: Look, sea plants.

shovel.en: Dig a hole. Plant a tree!

multiplayer_portal_moonrock.trans: 我想知道要把它通向什么地方。

trailmix.en: The perfect snack for a day of chopping.
trailmix.trans: 一天劳作之后的完美零食。

woodcarvedhat.en: What a beaut! Lucy outdid herself!
woodcarvedhat.trans: 多么美丽啊！露西超越了自己！

carnivaldecor_eggride_kit.en: Don't know why I'd want to build somethin' like that.
carnivaldecor_eggride_kit.trans: 我为什么要建那种东西。

brush.en: You could debark a log with this thing.
brush.trans: 你可以用这个东西削去树皮。

houndstooth_blowpipe.en: Almost spits more teeth than a Montreal Canadien.
houndstooth_blowpipe.trans: 几乎比蒙特利尔的加拿大的人吐的牙齿还多。

long.trans: 鸟类从来都是不慌不忙的。

generic.en: It's hatching.

spoiled_food.trans: 呀，就像约翰·迪芬贝克一样。

generic.en: I still don't trust it.

critter_puppy.trans: 人类和机器人最好的伙伴。

sleep.en: Looks kinda fun if I'm honest.

off.en: Does it look like it's working, Lucy?
off.trans: 露西，这东西是在工作么？

generic.en: Looks kinda fun if I'm honest.

boat_bumper_shell.en: There ya go, nice and safe.

chesspiece_moon.en: Someone did a good job on this.

wendy_resurrectiongrave.en: Of course I'd remember you, Luce.

farm_plow.en: Looks like it's got things under control.

tillweed.en: It sure doesn't give up without a fight.

walking_stick.en: A bird, huh? Real funny, Luce.
walking_stick.trans: 一只鸟，是吗？真有趣，露西。

furtuft.en: Shh! The creature might still be around.

perd.en: More birds! Why is it always birds?
perd.trans: 又是鸟！为什么总是鸟呢？

construction1.en: Might as well help the old guy out, eh?

construction2.en: Still a bit of building left to do.

generic.en: Huh. Whattaya figure it's for, Luce?
generic.trans: 呵呵。你觉得这个是做什么的，露西？

idle.en: Nothin' left to point us to.

generic.en: Not sure where it's leading me, but I might as well find out.
generic.trans: 虽然不知道会把我引向何方，但也不妨一探究竟。

batnosehat.en: Keeps my hands free for choppin'.
batnosehat.trans: 解放了我的双手，可以砍树了。

saddle_race.en: Makes me feel like some sorta woodland nymph, eh?
saddle_race.trans: 让我有森林女神的感觉，额？

trident.en: Don't worry Lucy, I'm not trading you in anytime soon.
trident.trans: 别害怕露西，我不会把你拿去换的。

pumpkincookie.trans: 吃了这个，就有力气一直砍树了。

walkingplank_ancient.en: Hopefully we don't have to abandon ship.

malbatross.en: It just had to be a giant bird.

burning.en: Better to do it now than regret it later, eh?
burning.trans: 现在烧了总好过将来后悔，诶？

generic.en: It's dead alright.

gingerbreadhouse.en: I prefer my houses made of wood.

quagmire_altar_statue2.en: Sure are a lot of statues around here.

barnaclestuffedfishhead.en: I'm not one to turn down some grub.
barnaclestuffedfishhead.trans: 我是不会拒绝吃幼虫的。

turf_beard_rug.en: He sacrificed a lot of beard for this rug.
turf_beard_rug.trans: 他为做这条地毯掉了不少胡子。

merm_toolshed.en: Looks like where the scaly folks keep their tools.
merm_toolshed.trans: 看样子像是那些鳞片人放工具的地方。

spice_garlic.en: I suppose some spice couldn't hurt.

shadow_forge_kit.en: It won't do much good sitting there like that.
shadow_forge_kit.trans: 它干放在那一点用都没有。

generic.en: It wants to show me something.

moon_altar_wip.en: Oh great, now I'm really hearing voices.

unhappy.en: That critter's in a real bad mood.

generic.en: They grow'em big out here, eh?
generic.trans: 它们越长越大，往这里来了，呃？

monkeypillar.en: Fake trees? It just ain't right.

yotb_pattern_fragment_1.en: Looks like I'll have to gather a few of these to make a whole pattern.
yotb_pattern_fragment_1.trans: 看起来我得再多收集几片才能拼成一个完整的款式。

yotb_pattern_fragment_2.en: Looks like I'll have to gather a few of these to make a whole pattern.
yotb_pattern_fragment_2.trans: 看起来我得再多收集几片才能拼成一个完整的款式。

yotb_pattern_fragment_3.en: Looks like I'll have to gather a few of these to make a whole pattern.
yotb_pattern_fragment_3.trans: 看起来我得再多收集几片才能拼成一个完整的款式。

lavaarena_strongdamagerhat.en: I could do some real damage with that.
lavaarena_strongdamagerhat.trans: 有了那个东西，我可以大肆破坏了。

wx78_moduleremover.en: Guess that's one way to do it.

weed_ivy.en: It has some nasty looking thorns on it.
weed_ivy.trans: 它上面有一些看起来很讨厌的刺。

goldenpickaxe.en: It's pretty, but it can't chop down trees.
goldenpickaxe.trans: 它确实很漂亮，但不能用来砍树。

inactive.en: I don't know how to move that.
inactive.trans: 我不知道该怎么把那玩意儿移开。

quagmire_seedpacket.en: This will keep us busy for a while.
quagmire_seedpacket.trans: 这个够我们忙活一阵子了。

handpillow_kelp.en: At least it's not filled with feathers.

ruinshat.en: It's no toque, but it'll do.
ruinshat.trans: 虽然不是无边帽，但还凑合。

ghostlyelixir_shield.trans: 呼，闻起来像是放了一星期的红三文鱼！

yotc_carrat_gym_stamina_item.en: Just aboot everything I need to toughen up my Carrat.
yotc_carrat_gym_stamina_item.trans: 强化胡萝卜鼠的必备品。

mosquitobomb.en: That's one angry bag of skeeters.

bloom.en: Chop it down before it spreads!
bloom.trans: 在它散播开之前砍倒它！

generic.en: I can't let that stand.

acidcovered.en: All the same to me. Let's get to choppin'.
acidcovered.trans: 对我来说都一样。咱们开砍吧。

generic.en: That's a big oil lamp.

spear_lance.en: I could give it a whirl.

halloweenpotion_fire_fx.en: It'll never replace a good hunk of wood.
halloweenpotion_fire_fx.trans: 它绝不能代替一大块木头。

nightlight.en: What kind of darkness is that?

twigs.en: I should build a tiny axe to chop these.
twigs.trans: 我应该做个小斧子来砍这些。

yotb.en: That judge might have something to say aboot it.
yotb.trans: 那个评委可能想点评一下它。

generic.en: Now that's cute. Don't you think, Luce?

corn_seeds.en: I'm more of a hewer of wood than a tiller of soil.
corn_seeds.trans: 我更多的是一名伐木工而不是农民。

cactus_meat.en: Would you put nails in your mouth?
cactus_meat.trans: 你会把钉子往自己嘴巴里塞吗？

deck_of_cards.en: No Lucy, you may not cut the deck. I know what you mean.
deck_of_cards.trans: 露西别闹，你不能切牌。我知道你是什么意思。

moonrock_pieces.en: That's in a pretty sorry state, eh?
moonrock_pieces.trans: 那是一个非常悲惨的状态，嗯？

featherhat.en: I want nothing to do with that... thing.
featherhat.trans: 我不想跟那...东西扯上任何关系。

atrium_key.en: Got it from that big bony hoser.
atrium_key.trans: 从那个瘦瘦的大傻子那里得到的。

pocketwatch_dismantler.en: I'll stick to my axe, thanks.
pocketwatch_dismantler.trans: 我还是习惯斧头，谢谢了。

destabilizing.en: That'd be my cue to leave.
destabilizing.trans: 这是我提示离开的暗示。

off.en: Where d'you think it goes, Lucy?

line_1.en: It's an old drawing of strange creatures.
line_1.trans: 这是一副古老的图画，画着奇怪的生物。

line_2.trans: 这里没留下什么有兴趣的东西。

line_5.trans: 看起来像是熙熙攘攘的城市。

line_3.en: Black muck is covering everything in this drawing.
line_3.trans: 图画里，黑色的淤泥覆盖了一切。

line_4.en: Don't look at this one, Lucy.

quagmire_mermhouse.en: Those scaly folks live in there.
quagmire_mermhouse.trans: 那些可怕的半人类就住在那里面。

generic.en: Wish I had those around the cabin.
generic.trans: 我那小木屋周围也该放上几个。

asparagus_cooked.en: Little easier to eat them cooked.

burning.en: Oh no! Don't put another log on the fire!
burning.trans: 噢，不要！别把另一根木头放在火上！

generic.en: It makes it all worthwhile.

trails.en: Mighty powerful right hook on that hoser.
trails.trans: 给那傻子一记厉害的右勾拳。

held.trans: 它在偷取我身体的热量。

generic.en: Go fly south or something!

spider_repellent.en: A nice bit of woodworking there, kiddo.
spider_repellent.trans: 这木工手艺可以啊，小屁孩。

pigtent.en: Looks to be some sort of tent.

chesspiece_bearger_mutated.en: We sure showed big boy, eh Luce?
chesspiece_bearger_mutated.trans: 我们给这大家伙了点颜色瞧瞧，诶，露西？

carnival_vest_c.en: At least it keeps the sun off me, eh?
carnival_vest_c.trans: 至少它能帮我遮太阳，诶？

carnival_vest_b.en: It came from a tree, but also from a bird... I'm feelin' conflicted.
carnival_vest_b.trans: 既是从树上来的，又是鸟身上的……我感到很矛盾。

lavaarena_firebomb.en: I'll leave that for someone else.

waxpaper.en: A good place to spit out your gum.
waxpaper.trans: 吐出你嘴里的口香糖的好地方。

merm_lunar.en: What the heck is happening to you guys?

emberlight.en: Just keep it away from the trees, eh?

generic.en: Nature's full of amazing things, eh?

book_bees.en: There's a whole book on the little buzzers, eh?
book_bees.trans: 一整本书都是讲这些嗡嗡叫的小家伙的，诶？

generic.en: Lucy would want me to chop it down.
generic.trans: 露西会希望我把它砍倒的。

revealed.en: Don't worry, Luce. I could never trade you.
revealed.trans: 别担心，露西。我铁定不会出卖你。

generic.en: It looks unnatural.

quagmire_turnip_seeds.en: Looks like new crop seeds to me.
quagmire_turnip_seeds.trans: 我看像是新的农作物种子。

turf_mud.en: At least you don't have to clean it.

archive_lockbox.en: Huh. There's something sloshing around in there.
archive_lockbox.trans: 哈。有什么东西在里面晃来晃去。

carnival_vest_a.en: Eh, it's alright. For being bird-made.
carnival_vest_a.trans: 诶，还行吧。鸟做的还想怎么样。

hound.en: They'd be good at pulling a sled.
hound.trans: 它们应该很擅长拉雪橇。

firestarter.en: That ape's playin' with fire!
firestarter.trans: 那个猿猴在玩火！

ghost.en: Bad day, eh?
ghost.trans: 今天过得不太好，诶？

murderer.en: That chimp's on the choppin' block!
murderer.trans: 那只猩猩早晚要被送上砧板！

attacker.en: Someone oughta teach that monkey some manners.
attacker.trans: 那只猴真该学学礼貌了。

reviver.en: There's a good heart hiding under all that fur, I can tell.
reviver.trans: 我能看出它一身猴毛之下藏着一颗善良的心。

generic.en: Hey Luce, does that monkey seem kinda familiar to you?
generic.trans: 嘿，露西，那只猴子是不是看着眼熟？

wx78module_maxhealth.trans: 胡里花哨的机器人零件。

generic.en: Every society's gotta have a leader, I guess.
generic.trans: 每个社团都有老大，我猜的。

wagstaff_mutations_note.en: Can't make heads or tails of it myself, but it seems important.
wagstaff_mutations_note.trans: 我虽然看不懂，但它好像很重要。

mask_queenhat.en: There's somethin' funny aboot that mask.

ancientfruit_nightvision_cooked.en: Is there anything else to eat?
ancientfruit_nightvision_cooked.trans: 还有其他东西可以吃吗？

quagmire_rubble_chimney.trans: 丝毫没留下壁炉的痕迹。

book_brimstone.en: I know better than to mess with that, eh.
book_brimstone.trans: 我才没有蠢到去惹那东西，嗯。

slurtle_shellpieces.en: His home is broken now. Oh.

fused_shadeling.en: Yeesh, this place is overrun with shadow critters!
fused_shadeling.trans: 咦，这地方暗影小动物满地乱跑！

glassed.en: Wait a minute, I don't think that's ice...

cave.en: We're free from the moon's reach down here.
cave.trans: 在这里，月亮够不到我们。

night_new.en: The moon's gone for now. Phew.

night_full.en: Not a good night to have a curse, but then when's it ever?
night_full.trans: 不是被诅咒的好夜晚，但以前有过吗？

night_wane.en: The moon's waning. Time for some peace and quiet.
night_wane.trans: 月亮在亏损了。是时候休息平静一下了。

generic.en: Do I really need to be reminded of the moon during the day?
generic.trans: 在白天，我真的需要被提醒月亮的存在吗？

archive_security_pulse.en: Hey Luce, should we be worried aboot that?
archive_security_pulse.trans: 嘿露西，那东西我们应该担心吗？

generic.en: I'm not usually one for fancy spices.
generic.trans: 我通常不喜欢花哨的香料。

tomato_oversized.en: Maybe I'll squish it up and put it on some chips.
tomato_oversized.trans: 看我做成番茄酱蘸薯条吃。

thulecite.en: It's the wood of the caves!
thulecite.trans: 它可以说是洞穴里的木头！

quagmire_rubble_carriage.trans: 嗯，我想知道这里发生了什么事？

generic.en: That's a bramble.

quagmire_grill_small.trans: 要不要来 BBQ 呀，露西？

infused.en: It's got a little glow to it.

generic.en: Almost could've mistook it for ice.

succulent_potted.en: Ain't a tree, but ain't bad.

burnt.en: I don't think it can still be considered a tent.
burnt.trans: 我觉得它现在已经称不上是帐篷了。

generic.en: I'm used to sleeping in worse.
generic.trans: 我已经习惯在糟糕的环境中睡觉。

boat_grass_item.en: I'd rather have a boat made of good, dependable wood.
boat_grass_item.trans: 造船还得用可靠耐用的木头。

moonglassaxe.en: Still not as good as Lucy.

boards.en: So smooth. You can really see the grain.
boards.trans: 好光滑。你真的可以看到它上面的纹理。

giftwrap.en: Should we do something nice today, Lucy?
giftwrap.trans: 我们今天来做些好事吧，露西？

pocket_scale.en: I'm gonna reel in a whopper, no doubt aboot it.
pocket_scale.trans: 绝对能拉上来一条大家伙，稳了。

carnivaldecor_plant_kit.en: Might as well get it set up, eh?

moon_cap_cooked.en: The smell's enough to wake you up.

slingshot_frame_wagpunk_0.en: Kid is getting fancy with that slingshooter.
slingshot_frame_wagpunk_0.trans: 这小子耍弹弓越来越利索了。

dreadstone_stack.en: I don't like where this is going, and I really don't like where it's comin' from.
dreadstone_stack.trans: 我不喜欢它的去处，我也不喜欢它的来处。

milkywhites.en: Oh... uh... do I have to touch it?
milkywhites.trans: 这个……呃……我一定要碰一下吗？

generic.en: I should steal its egg to teach it a lesson.
generic.trans: 我应该去偷它的蛋，给它点儿教训。

eyemaskhat.en: Protective eye gear that protects everything but the eyes.
eyemaskhat.trans: 保护性眼罩，除了眼睛什么都能保护。

wx78module_bee.trans: 胡里花哨的机器人零件。

wall_wood_item.en: I like the look of that!

turf_fungus.trans: 黏糊糊的，像豌豆泥一样。

generic.en: No one'll miss it.

chopped.en: Put it out of its misery.

generic.en: The sea sucked all the good tree juice out of it.
generic.trans: 大海把它好的树液都吸干了。

mask_dollbrokenhat.en: There's somethin' funny aboot that mask.

desiccantboosted.trans: 尝到我的厉害了吧，臭雨！

honeynuggets.en: That's one of my favourite meals!
honeynuggets.trans: 那是我最喜欢的食物之一！

armormarble.en: It's hard to swing an axe while wearing this.
armormarble.trans: 穿着这个很难挥动斧子。

firestarter.en: %s betrays the forest!
firestarter.trans: %s背叛了森林！

ghost.en: Yer looking a little pale, %s.
ghost.trans: 你的脸色有点苍白，%s。

murderer.en: You're on the chopping block now, %s!

attacker.en: %s is getting too big for her britches.

reviver.en: I knew we were gonna get along.
reviver.trans: 我就知道我们会相处得很好的。

generic.en: %s! Hey there bud!

charlie_npc.en: Her face looks familiar, I think I've seen it in my nightmares.
charlie_npc.trans: 她看着面熟，我应该在噩梦里梦到过。

yotc_carrat_gym_direction_item.en: My Carrat's gonna be as quick as a Canadian summer!
yotc_carrat_gym_direction_item.trans: 我的胡萝卜鼠会像加拿大的夏天一样快！

pomegranate.trans: 这东西对我来说太复杂了。

sharkboi.en: I normally like ice fishin', but not when the fish bite back!
sharkboi.trans: 我喜欢冰钓，但鱼要是反咬我一口那就不喜欢了！

guard.en: That one looks like he means business.
guard.trans: 那家伙看上去不是闹着玩玩的。

werepig.en: Happens to the best of us.

generic.en: Walking back bacon!

off.en: It oughta be green like a lush, choppable forest.
off.trans: 它应该像郁郁葱葱的可以劈砍的森林一样的绿色的。

burnt.trans: 那东西被很好地烧焦了。

on.en: It illuminates with all the colours of the wind.
on.trans: 它和风的所有颜色一样发着光了。

unlocked.en: Now all it needs is to be turned on.
unlocked.trans: 现在只需要启动它就可以了。

generic.en: It looks like something should plug in.
generic.trans: 看来它上面应该插有东西的。

scrap_monoclehat.en: I can see far and wide!

freshlight.en: Aboot time we brightened this place up, eh?
freshlight.trans: 大概是我们点亮这个地方的时间了，嗯？

generic.en: A little bit of nature makes everything nicer.
generic.trans: 一点点的自然本性让一切变得更美好。

burnt.trans: 一个燃烧着的木头桌子。

empty.en: Such a beaut of a wood table shouldn't be hidden by a cloth.
empty.trans: 这样一张漂亮的木头桌子不应该被布所覆盖。

supertacklecontainer.en: Lucy keeps saying I should be more organized.
supertacklecontainer.trans: 露西总说我应该有条理一点。

boat_bumper_kelp_kit.en: A bit of padding might be a good idea.
boat_bumper_kelp_kit.trans: 找点东西垫着可能不错。

beargerfur_sack.en: Keeps things nice and frosty, eh?
beargerfur_sack.trans: 让那些东西漂亮地挂点霜，诶？

papyrus.trans: 我宁愿砍树也不要写字。

moon_altar_idol.en: It wants me to carry it somewhere.

gestalt_guard_evolved.en: They are not happy with us, Lucy.

spicepack.en: A handy knapsack for conserving food!

mask_kinghat.en: There's somethin' funny aboot that mask.

dug_trap_starfish.en: I should find a place to put it.

comfy.en: Cozier than a moose wrapped in duct tape!
comfy.trans: 比用管道胶带裹起来的驼鹿还舒服！

batwing_cooked.trans: 好恶心！但又很好吃！好为难啊！

deflated.en: Just a regular balloon now, eh?
deflated.trans: 现在只是个普通的气球了？

generic.en: Now how do you figure that works, Luce?
generic.trans: 你觉得那是怎么回事，露西？

some_kelp.en: I think I could pile on a little more.
some_kelp.trans: 我应该还能再堆点上去。

generic.en: Let's give it a little greenery, eh?

dug_berrybush_juicy.en: This would be more useful somewhere else, eh?
dug_berrybush_juicy.trans: 这个在其他的地方更有用，额？

burning.en: I hope that doesn't spread to the trees.
burning.trans: 希望这火不会蔓延到树上。

diseased.en: It's caught a bit of a bug.

withered.en: Maybe it'd thrive if it was cooler out?
withered.trans: 如果温度再低些，它也许会长得很好？

generic.en: Looks like kindling.

barren.en: I need to poop on it.

quagmire_pond_salt.en: Wouldn't wanna swim in it, that's fer sure.
quagmire_pond_salt.trans: 我肯定不想在里面游泳。

carnival_plaza_kit.en: The one thing birds are good for, planting trees.

barnaclinguine.en: Sorry, I'm eatin' this whole thing myself.
barnaclinguine.trans: 对不起，这个我要全部一个人吃。

generic.en: It's like a bird, but worse.
Better take my turn watering the garden.

empty.en: Out of water.

charged.en: It's pretty as the Northern lights.

generic.en: Weather's not going to get the drop on me now.
generic.trans: 现在我不会被闪电劈了。

head.en: I don't know which end is uglier.
head.trans: 我也说不清是哪一头更丑。

flipped.en: It's upside down but not out.
flipped.trans: 虽然翻了个底朝天，但它还没歇菜。

body.en: It's as thick as an oak!

boat_leak.en: Better plug that up soon or we'll be swimmin'.
boat_leak.trans: 赶紧补上，不然咱们都得游泳了。

monkey_smallhat.en: I sure hope there aren't any fleas in it.

mutator_dropper.en: Sorry little buddy, I think I'll have to pass.
mutator_dropper.trans: 对不起，小家伙，俺不吃这玩意。

wormhole_limited.en: It smells a bit off, eh?
wormhole_limited.trans: 闻起来有点不是味儿，对吗？

eggplant_seeds.trans: 或许我可以把它们种起来？

security_pulse_cage_full.en: Great Lakes, I think she caught something!
security_pulse_cage_full.trans: 五大湖啊，她好像抓住什么了！

penguin.en: Doesn't matter if you're from the Great White North. Still a bird.
penguin.trans: 你是否来自加拿大并不重要。不论怎样你都是只鸟。

rainhat.en: Always keep a dry head while chopping.
rainhat.trans: 在砍树的时候始终保持头部干燥。

burning.en: Burnt blacker than a pile o' pucks.

reviving.en: Not somethin' you see everyday, eh Luce?
reviving.trans: 这东西不是天天见吧，诶露西？

generic.en: Someone punched this pooch's ticket.
generic.trans: 有人给这条狗的票打了孔。

quagmire_rubble_bike.en: It's not gonna work like that.

talleggs.en: A hearty breakfast and one less bird in the world, what could be better?
talleggs.trans: 不但吃了早餐吃好了，而且世上还能少只鸟，这种好事能不能再多点？

kitcoon_forest.en: You look like you could use some pats, eh?
kitcoon_forest.trans: 你是想让俺摸摸你吗，诶？

fishingrod.en: I should spend some time at the lake.
fishingrod.trans: 我应该去湖边待一会儿。

boatpatch_kelp.en: Not nearly as dependable as wood, but it'll do in a pinch.
boatpatch_kelp.trans: 远不如木材可靠，但在紧要关头也能用。

book_tentacles.en: They don't have tentacles in Canada.
book_tentacles.trans: 他们在加拿大没有触手。

burnt.en: I was just startin' to get used to having it around.

generic.en: Quiet type, eh?
Looks like Winona's work.
Where's the log lizard?
That just ain't right.

turf_fungus_moon.trans: 黏糊糊的，像豌豆泥一样。

shieldofterror.en: Hmm, metal teeth would sure be handy fer choppin'...
shieldofterror.trans: 嗯，金属牙齿肯定很方便用来砍树……

turf_checkerfloor.en: Looks like one of those city-people outhouses.
turf_checkerfloor.trans: 看起来像城市里户外厕所的地板。

wx78module_cold.trans: 胡里花哨的机器人零件。

stash_map.en: Whatcha say, Luce? Should we see where it leads?
stash_map.trans: 露西，你怎么看？咱们要不要追查一下？

line_2.en: I never even got a handle on French, don't expect me to read that.
line_2.trans: 我连法语都没学好，更别说这个了。

line_4.en: I never even got a handle on French, don't expect me to read that.
line_4.trans: 我连法语都没学好，更别说这个了。

pig_coin.en: A favour I can cash in some time.
pig_coin.trans: 我可以随时兑现的一个人情。

generic.en: Pretty nice setup, eh?

empty.en: It needs a little something...

eyebrellahat.en: Always good to have something watching over you.
eyebrellahat.trans: 有东西看着你总归是好事。

playing_hideandseek.en: I don't see any hiding in there.
playing_hideandseek.trans: 好像没看到什么东西藏在里面。

playing_hideandseek_time_almost_up.en: Looks like I'm just aboot outta time.
playing_hideandseek_time_almost_up.trans: 我的时间好像快走完了。

burnt.en: What a waste of good wood.
burnt.trans: 好好的木头就这么糟蹋了。

generic.en: Looks too much like a bird house for my tastes.
generic.trans: 太像鸟屋了，不对我胃口。

oceanfishableflotsam.en: A bit of mud won't hurt ya.

knight_nightmare.en: Doesn't look to be in the best of shape.
knight_nightmare.trans: 好像并不是它最好的状态。

quagmire_garlic_seeds.en: Looks like new crop seeds to me.
quagmire_garlic_seeds.trans: 我看像是新的农作物种子。

carnival_crowkid.en: I think I had a nightmare like this once...
carnival_crowkid.trans: 我以前有过这样的噩梦……

oceantreenut.en: I'm gonna enjoy chopping you down one day.
oceantreenut.trans: 总有一天我会很享受地把你砍下来。

kitcoondecor2_kit.en: I bet those kits would love a toy to play with.
kitcoondecor2_kit.trans: 这些小猫肯定想要玩具。

berries.en: I have a heartier appetite than that.

petals.en: I wonder if Lucy would like these.
petals.trans: 不知道露西喜不喜欢这些。

quagmire_onion.en: I only cry tears of joy.
quagmire_onion.trans: 我只会流出喜悦的泪水。

generic.en: Lookin' good!

empty.en: How aboot givin' it some charcoal?

generic.en: Hey! Watch where you're rollin', eh?
generic.trans: 喂！以后要小心点了吧，诶？

quagmire_key.trans: 我猜这是保险箱的钥匙。

generic.en: I get the feelin' it doesn't like us one bit, Luce.
generic.trans: 我感觉它一点都不喜欢咱们，露西。

chesspiece_eyeofterror.en: That's the worst case of cataract I've ever seen.
chesspiece_eyeofterror.trans: 这是我见过的最糟糕的白内障病例。

lightsout.en: Sorry! I'm not peeping, I swear!
lightsout.trans: 对不起！我没有偷窥，我发誓！

generic.en: A little duct tape would fix that right up.
generic.trans: 只需要一点管道胶带就可以把它修好。

burnt.en: A mere shell of its former glory.
burnt.trans: 昔日的辉煌如今烧的只剩外壳了。

drying_notmeat.en: Watching stuff dry passes for entertainment 'round here.
drying_notmeat.trans: 看着东西风干也是一种海岛娱乐。

drying.en: This is like watching meat dry.
drying.trans: 这就像看着肉慢慢变干。

dryinginrain_notmeat.trans: 今天有点潮湿，是不是，老乡？

dryinginrain.en: This is like watching meat dry... in the rain.
dryinginrain.trans: 这就像看着肉变干...在雨天里慢慢变干。

burnt.trans: 它已经没有利用价值了。

generic.en: It's all set up. Just add meat.
generic.trans: 都安装好了。只要加肉就好了。

tomato_seeds.en: Looks like new crop seeds to me.
tomato_seeds.trans: 我看像是新的农作物种子。

alterguardian_phase3.en: Well, third time's the charm, eh?
alterguardian_phase3.trans: 啊，第三次好运会来吧，诶？

kitcoon_grass.en: You look like you could use some pats, eh?
kitcoon_grass.trans: 你是想让俺摸摸你吗，诶？

moon_altar_link.en: It's givn' me the heebie jeebies.

yoth_knightstick.en: Looks like the one I had as a kid.
yoth_knightstick.trans: 看着跟我小时候的玩具差不多。

icehat.en: I could chop it if I had to.
icehat.trans: 如果有必要的话，我可以把这个也剁碎。

quagmire_tomato_seeds.en: Looks like new crop seeds to me.
quagmire_tomato_seeds.trans: 我看像是新的农作物种子。

ghostlyelixir_fastregen.trans: 呼，闻起来像是放了一星期的红三文鱼！

relic.en: I don't plan on fixin' that.

yellowmooneye.trans: 盯着人看是很没礼貌的。

quagmire_salmon.en: Need a good cedar plank to cook it on.
quagmire_salmon.trans: 需要把它放在一块不错的杉木板上烤。

turf_carpetfloor2.en: A fancy place to leave muddy footprints.
turf_carpetfloor2.trans: 再高级也会留下带泥巴的脚印。

held.en: I can't wait to light it up.

generic.en: Aw, that's pretty.

statuemaxwell.en: I'm gonna make fun of him for this later, eh?
statuemaxwell.trans: 稍后我要用这个逗一下他，额？

rope_bridge_kit.trans: 你认为它能坚持住吗，露西？

dragonfruit.en: I've never seen one of those before.
dragonfruit.trans: 我以前从来没见过这东西。

bomb_lunarplant_wormwood.en: Somethin' aboot it seems more dangerous than usual.

polly_rogershat.en: I can't put my finger on it, but there's somethin' aboot it I don't like.
polly_rogershat.trans: 我也说不清楚，但是我就是不太喜欢它。

yotc_carrat_race_checkpoint.en: This marker should help 'em find the finish line.
yotc_carrat_race_checkpoint.trans: 拿这个当记号，它们就能找到终点的方向了。

wagpunkhat.en: Looks like some sorta techie tin toque.

hermithouse_laundry.en: I really should do my laundry.

generic.en: Wonder what Winona sees in them.
generic.trans: 不知道薇诺娜戴上能瞅到什么。

poweroff.en: Now that's a funny looking gadget. Too bad it doesn't work.
poweroff.trans: 这真是一个看起来很有趣的小工具。可惜它不好使了。

generic.en: Well whattaya know! It just needed a little juice.
generic.trans: 好吧！它只是需要通点电。

walrushat.en: My granddad wore a hat like that.
walrushat.trans: 我爷爷也有一顶这样的帽子。

steelwool.en: That'll put the shine back on yer axe.
steelwool.trans: 用这个可以让你的斧子重新变得闪亮。

lunarrift_crystal.en: Glitterin' like icicles on a winter morning.
lunarrift_crystal.trans: 像冬天里大清早的冰柱一样闪闪发亮。

generic.en: I've never had one of these before.
generic.trans: 我以前从来没有过这东西。

red_cap_cooked.en: You'd have to be really, really hungry.

oceanfishingbobber_robin_winter.en: Hmph. Guess birds are good for some things.
oceanfishingbobber_robin_winter.trans: 嗯。看来鸟也不是一无是处。

ancienttree_seed.en: I know you hope it's a tree, Luce. I do too.
ancienttree_seed.trans: 露西，我知道你希望它是棵树。我也是这么想的。

mutator_warrior.en: Sorry little buddy, I think I'll have to pass.
mutator_warrior.trans: 对不起，小家伙，俺不吃这玩意。

dreadstonehat.en: Gotta protect the old noggin', eh?

record_hallowednights.en: You can really... swing an axe to this.

accomplishment_shrine.en: It seems a bit show-offy to me.
accomplishment_shrine.trans: 对我来说似乎有点炫耀的意味。

bell.en: I'm amazed it makes such a crisp sound.
bell.trans: 它居然能发出这么清脆的声音，太让我惊讶了。

californiaroll.en: That fish looks cozy bundled up in all that rice and seaweed.
californiaroll.trans: 那条鱼绑在米饭和海藻里看起来很舒服。

armorslurper.en: It tickles. I think it's still alive.
armorslurper.trans: 好痒，我觉得它还是活的。

yotb.en: That judge might have something to say aboot it.
yotb.trans: 那个评委可能想点评一下它。

generic.en: Now that's cute. Don't you think, Luce?

houndmound.en: I know better than to mess with that.
houndmound.trans: 我才没有蠢到去惹那东西。

seeds_cooked.trans: 我们把它叫做“伐木工的惊喜”。

boneshard.en: I wish I knew how to make bread.
boneshard.trans: 真希望我知道如何做面包。

candybag.en: That there bag could hold a whole heap of candy.
candybag.trans: 那里的袋子可能装着一大堆糖果。

mutatedbearger.en: Lookit those mitts! Someone get this tendy a twig!
mutatedbearger.trans: 看看那双手套！快给这位冰上曲棍球守门员递上一条树枝！

book_fish.en: Is there a chapter on ice fishing?

monstermeat.en: I'm not hungry enough for that.
monstermeat.trans: 我还没有饿到吃怪物肉的地步。

turnip_seeds.en: Looks like new crop seeds to me.
turnip_seeds.trans: 我看像是新的农作物种子。

normal.en: A fire that needs no wood? Unnn-natural!
normal.trans: 不需要木材的营火？太太太违反自然规律了！

generic.en: It's looking a tad crusty.

out.en: It looks like it could break.
out.trans: 它看起来像要碎掉一样。

scandata.en: Doesn't seem right to boil nature down to just a bunch of facts and figures.
scandata.trans: 把大自然归结成一堆事实和数字似乎不太对。

wagstaff_tool_1.en: I'd better run it back to that old-timer.
wagstaff_tool_1.trans: 我最好把这个拿回去给那老头。

batnose.en: Who nose where the rest of it went.
batnose.trans: 谁知道剩下的鼻子去哪了。

wagstaff_tool_2.en: Not really sure what it is, but maybe I'll bring it to that old-timer just in case.
wagstaff_tool_2.trans: 我也不知道这个是什么，我还是拿回去给那老头看看。

armor_sanity.en: It makes me queasy to look at.

wagstaff_tool_3.en: Hey Luce, does that look like a whatever-he-said to you?
wagstaff_tool_3.trans: 嘿，露西，这个像不像他跟你说的那东西？

wagstaff_tool_4.en: Wouldn't hurt to see if this is what that old-timer's been looking for.
wagstaff_tool_4.trans: 看看这个是不是那个老头想找的。

wagstaff_tool_5.en: That might be just the thing I'm lookin' for!
wagstaff_tool_5.trans: 那个可能就是我要找的！

panettone.en: Even bread gets sweeter over the holidays!
panettone.trans: 到过节了连面包都甜起来了！

generic.en: Even the flower is slimy.

wx78module_maxhealth2.trans: 胡里花哨的机器人零件。

steeringwheel_item.en: We should set up the base of the boat first.

quagmire_onion_seeds.en: Looks like new crop seeds to me.
quagmire_onion_seeds.trans: 我看像是新的农作物种子。

book_fire.en: My first instinct when I see a fire isn't to crack open a book.
book_fire.trans: 我看到火灾的第一反应可不是翻开一本书。

cactus_flower.en: It's a wonder anything grows in this climate at all.
cactus_flower.trans: 这种鬼气候下还能长出东西简直就是个奇迹。

torch.trans: 火炬让我又能看到树了。

occupied.en: They're takin' a load off, eh?

generic.en: It looks a bit hard for my behind.

chesspiece_sharkboi.trans: 瞧瞧这一口鱼腥味的家伙。

generic.en: Trees made into... paper? How unholy!

moonrockseed.en: I should probably put this down somewhere, eh?
moonrockseed.trans: 我应该把它放在什么地方，对吧？

snowball.en: Yup. That's a big ol' snowball.

generic.en: I've seen my share of snowmen.

burnt.en: Its knowledge of rain didn't keep it from being burned.
burnt.trans: 气候专家也躲不过被烧毁的命运。

generic.en: Rain makes the trees grow.

lavaarena_armormedium.trans: 木盔甲总比啥也没有的强。

frozenbananadaiquiri.en: Nothin' like kickin' back with a cold one, eh?
frozenbananadaiquiri.trans: 没有什么比喝着冷饮更让人舒服了，对不？

spiderhat.en: She's a real beaut, ain't she?

chum.en: Smells bad, but the fish love it.

lunarthrall_plant_vine_end.en: I think it's time you and Lucy got acquainted.
lunarthrall_plant_vine_end.trans: 你跟露西该好好相处一下了。

nightcaphat.en: A good cap to wear when you're sawing logs.
nightcaphat.trans: 锯木头时戴这帽子刚刚好。

burning.en: Aw! He barely had a chance!

diseasing.trans: 给木头的一个蹩脚的借口。

picked.en: Picking isn't as fun as chopping.
picked.trans: 采摘与砍树相比真是太没意思了。

diseased.en: It's caught a bit of a bug.

withered.en: With this heat it'll never grow to chopping size!
withered.trans: 在这么炎热的天气下，它永远也不会长到适合砍伐的大小！

generic.en: I want to see it grow so I can chop it down.
generic.trans: 我想要看它长大，那样我就可以砍掉它了。

punchingbag.en: I should see how much of a punch I'm packing, eh?
punchingbag.trans: 让我来瞧瞧我打一下能有多厉害，诶？

hermitcrabtea_firenettles.en: This would have been good up north.

carnivaldecor_figure_kit_season2.en: I can't stop wondering what's inside...
carnivaldecor_figure_kit_season2.trans: 我忍不住想知道里面有什么……

lavaarena_eyecirclethat.en: I don't see much use for that.
lavaarena_eyecirclethat.trans: 我觉得那个对我没什么用。

voidcloth_umbrella.en: As long as it works, I won't complain aboot how it looks.
voidcloth_umbrella.trans: 管用就行，我就不抱怨外观了。

seafoodgumbo.en: We don't have this back home.

sweatervest.en: It's not plaid, but it'll do.
sweatervest.trans: 虽然不是格子图案的，但还凑合。

generic.en: What kind of oven doesn't take wood?
generic.trans: 什么破炉子连木头都不烧？

burnt.en: I'd like to complain to the chef. Politely.
burnt.trans: 我要向厨师投诉。我会注意礼貌的。

generic.en: What a waste of good pork.
generic.trans: 真是浪费了这么好的猪肉。

firecrackers.en: Let's not set them off in the forest.
firecrackers.trans: 我们别让它们在森林里面离开。

generic.en: Let's see what we've got to work with!

empty.en: This guy looks hungry.

purplegem.en: It's nothing a good chopping wouldn't fix.
purplegem.trans: 没什么是优秀伐木工解决不了的。

moonstorm_static_roamer.trans: 咱们该把这闪电装进瓶子里！

horn.en: I don't know if anyone should put their mouth on that.
horn.trans: 我不确定人们是否应该把嘴放到那上面。

generic.en: Points to the True North.

oceanfishingbobber_none.en: Hm. Could really use a float of some kind.

tophat_magician.en: I'll stick to a nice cozy toque, thanks.
tophat_magician.trans: 我还是习惯无边帽，谢谢了。

oceanfishinglure_spinner_red.en: This'll be sure to reel them in, eh?
oceanfishinglure_spinner_red.trans: 这下肯定能钓到鱼了，对不？

farm_plow_item.en: Where should we put the garden, Luce?
farm_plow_item.trans: 我们把花园建在什么地方好，露西？

livingtree_sapling.en: Yep. That'll be a fine tree one day.
livingtree_sapling.trans: 对。有一天它会长成漂亮的大树。

battlesong_lunaraligned.en: Don't recognize the song. Maybe it wasn't released in Canada.
battlesong_lunaraligned.trans: 听不出这首歌。也许它没在加拿大发行。

hermitcrabtea_forgetmelots.en: Hopefully I'll know when to drink it.
hermitcrabtea_forgetmelots.trans: 希望我知道什么时候该喝它。

corn_oversized.en: Shucks, that's a lot of corn!

off.en: Does it look like it's working, Lucy?
off.trans: 露西，这东西是在工作么？

generic.en: Nifty gadget, eh?

oceanvine.en: Nice of it to hold that fig for me.
oceanvine.trans: 很高兴它能为我保管那个无花果。

wall_scrap.trans: 墙发出臭味是正常的吗？

lavaarena_healingflowerhat.en: That flower'd look nice with my beard.
lavaarena_healingflowerhat.trans: 那朵花跟我的胡子很配。

dumbbell_golden.en: I'll stick to lifting my axe.

shellweaver.en: I don't think it makes pickles.
shellweaver.trans: 这东西能腌不出酸黄瓜吧？

active.en: Something is off aboot that rock, eh?
active.trans: 那块石头有点奇怪，你说呢？

merm.en: What foul sea did that crawl out of?
merm.trans: 那东西是从多肮脏的大海里面爬出来的啊？

oceanfishingrod.en: Let's see if the fish are bitin', eh?
oceanfishingrod.trans: 咱们来看看鱼儿咬钩没，好不？

balloonhat.en: We can all appreciate nature in our own way.
balloonhat.trans: 我们都可以用自己的方式欣赏大自然。

generic.en: I don't like it either, Luce.

rock_avocado_fruit_sprout.en: Guess we didn't eat that one in time.

carnivaldecor_banner.en: Argh, it flashed the sun in my eyes! Curse you, birds!!
carnivaldecor_banner.trans: 啊，它让阳光闪到了我的眼睛！你们这些坏鸟！！

portablefirepit_item.en: Sure, Lucy. We can feed it.
portablefirepit_item.trans: 没问题，露西。咱们不缺东西喂它。

backpack.trans: 那是个好看的帆布背包。

wagpunk_lever.en: Lever, Lucy. I said it's a great lever. Sheesh.
wagpunk_lever.trans: 拉杆，露西。真是根好拉杆。啧。

bird_egg_cooked.en: Well, at least it never became a bird.
bird_egg_cooked.trans: 很好，至少它永远不会变成讨厌的鸟。

statue.en: Wonder where that sculpture came from.
statue.trans: 不知道那是哪来的雕像。

generic.en: Look at the size of you.

pumpkin.en: I don't like to eat things that grow on the ground.
pumpkin.trans: 我讨厌吃长在地上的东西。

chesspiece_formal.en: Looks like a bit of a hoser.

wx78module_maxsanity1.trans: 胡里花哨的机器人零件。

hambat.en: What a waste of good ham.
hambat.trans: 真是浪费了美味的火腿。

slingshot_band_mimic.en: Kid is getting fancy with that slingshooter.
slingshot_band_mimic.trans: 这小子耍弹弓越来越利索了。

reskin_tool.en: A change of scenery might be nice, eh?

diseased.en: It's caught a bit of a bug.

generic.en: Choppin's choppin'.

book_silviculture.en: Hey, I think this one grows trees!

berries_juicy_cooked.en: Mmm. These'd be perfect with some syrup.

mashedpotatoes.en: A nice change of pace from meatballs.

hotchili.en: Good after a long day of chopping in the cold.
hotchili.trans: 在冷天里砍了一天树之后来点辣椒真不错。

lavaarena_feathercrownhat.en: I don't think agility is my thing, eh?
lavaarena_feathercrownhat.trans: 我觉得敏捷不是我的风格，对吧？

generic.en: Looks sturdy... ish.

webberskull.en: The skull gives me the willies, too.
webberskull.trans: 这个头骨也让我心惊胆战。

hareball.en: It's for a dare, eh? Alright, I'll bite.

stalagmite_tall.en: I'm not too interested in rocks.

decor_centerpiece.en: I'm pretty sure it's makin' a statement. Aboot something.
decor_centerpiece.trans: 我很确定这是一种表态。内容不详。

chesspiece_antlion.trans: 看起来跟真的一样，对不？

lunar_seed.trans: 咱们给它干趴下了，对吧露西？

shadowdancer.en: Well, looks like he finally lost it.

generic.en: Don't worry Luce. She's got nothin' on ya.
generic.trans: 别担心，露西。她手上没有你的把柄。

burnt.trans: 露西！告诉我不是你干的。

wormwood_mutantproxy_lightflier.en: Keep lighting my way and we'll get along just fine, bud!
wormwood_mutantproxy_lightflier.trans: 继续照亮我的路，我们会相处得很好，伙计！

blowdart_lava2.en: Someone else'll make better use of it.

generic.en: Pixie dust tickles my nose.
generic.trans: 小妖精抖下的粉弄痒我的鼻子了。

generic_smallstack.en: Huh. I managed to collect a pretty good pile.

generic_largestack.en: Those birds thought they could cheat me, eh? Guess again!
generic_largestack.trans: 就那些鸟还想蒙我，诶？好好盘算清楚吧！

generic.en: I bet they rig the games, that'd be just like a bird...
generic.trans: 它们肯定会在游戏里作弊，鸟就是这个鸟样……

burnt.en: Couldn't even build a fireproof house.
burnt.trans: 连建造一间防火的房子都不会。

generic.en: They're not the handiest.

spore_moon.en: Those spores pop like first of July fireworks!
spore_moon.trans: 这些孢子就像7月1日的烟花一样爆开了！

oceanfishinglure_hermit_snow.en: I wouldn't mind a bit of ice fishing.

uncovered.en: Looks a bit like one of them chargin' hosers.
uncovered.trans: 看起来他们中有人在攻击傻子。

ready.en: Is stone supposed to move like that?
ready.trans: 石头应该像那样移动吗？

covered.en: Just a big hunk of stone, as far as I'm concerned.
covered.trans: 依我看，只是一大块石头。

finished.en: As if I didn't have enough reasons to hate full moons.
finished.trans: 好像我没有足够的理由来讨厌满月。

boatrace_spectator_dragonling.en: You here to watch the race, bud?

generic.en: Looks like somethin' was written here, but it faded away.
generic.trans: 看起来以前写过些东西，但渐渐掉色了。

horrorfuel.en: That stuff can't be good for ya.

held.en: Where are you going to run?

generic.en: I never trusted those things, eh?
generic.trans: 我从来不相信那些东西，你说呢？

generic.en: I'm sure I have an extra pine cone somewhere.
generic.trans: 我确信我在其他地方还有一个松果。

burnt.en: Too bad. Made the place feel real cozy.
burnt.trans: 太糟糕了，让这地方感觉真安逸。

oceanfishinglure_spoon_red.en: This'll be sure to reel them in, eh?
oceanfishinglure_spoon_red.trans: 这下肯定能钓到鱼了，对不？

chesspiece_deerclops_mutated.en: She'd look great up on the mantle.
chesspiece_deerclops_mutated.trans: 她挂在壁炉架上一定很好看。

slingshotammo_container.en: Hours of fun and destruction for the kiddo.
slingshotammo_container.trans: 小娃娃可以搞破坏玩几个小时了。

wagboss_robot_secret.en: Are you as curious as I am, Luce?
wagboss_robot_secret.trans: 你也和我一样好奇吗，露西？

chesspiece_depthworm.en: We had some close calls with this guy, eh Luce?
chesspiece_depthworm.trans: 咱们差点就和这家伙干架，对吧，露西？

moon_altar_ward.en: Just how did you get underground?

ancienttree_sapling_item.en: Where would you like to be chopped down eventually?
ancienttree_sapling_item.trans: 你以后想在哪里被砍掉？

ready.en: Is stone supposed to move like that?
ready.trans: 石头应该像那样移动吗？

covered.en: I don't get art. Whattaya think Lucy?
covered.trans: 我不懂艺术。你怎么想，露西？

finished.en: Whose bright idea was it to fix this thing?
finished.trans: 是谁想出修理这东西的好主意？

rock_avocado_fruit.en: Too hard to eat, but at least it smells nice.
rock_avocado_fruit.trans: 硬的咬不动，不过闻着挺香。

generic.en: I think I prefer cedar chests.
generic.trans: 我还是更喜欢雪松箱子。

rottenegg.trans: 这世上将少一只鸟。很好。

critter_lamb.en: Heh, it feels like a beard.

alterguardian_phase3deadorb.en: Hey! You be careful there, bud!
alterguardian_phase3deadorb.trans: 喂，伙计！你可要当心点啊！

oceanfishinglure_hermit_drowsy.en: Gonna have to hold that one real carefully.

burning.en: That's one way to go about it.

generic.en: Shall we, Luce?

stalker_atrium.en: That fuel stuff's gone to its head.
stalker_atrium.trans: 那些燃料材料都跑到它头上了。

bishop.en: It's been a while since my last confession.
bishop.trans: 离我上一次忏悔已经有一阵子了。

freshlight.en: Aboot time we brightened this place up, eh?
freshlight.trans: 是时候点亮这个地方了，诶？

generic.en: A little bit of nature makes everything nicer.
generic.trans: 一点点的自然本性让一切变得更美好。

empty.en: It could use a bit of nature.

poweroff.en: Not much happening with this thing.

generic.en: I'm not sure I like the look of it.

figkabab.en: Nothin' better than food served on a wooden stick, eh?
figkabab.trans: 没有什么比撸串更好了，对不？

generic.en: That tone's as low as the temperatures back home.
generic.trans: 我们老家音调就和气温一样低。

generic.en: Can it play "O Canada"?
Let's finish this shell collection on a high note, eh?
generic.trans: 咱们高调完成这个贝壳系列，诶？

flotationcushion.en: There's room for both of us, Luce.

wobster_sheller.en: Wouldn't mind some fresh seafood right aboot now.
wobster_sheller.trans: 现在吃点海鲜最舒服了。

chopped.en: I might have chopped more than once.

generic.en: Measure twice, chop once.

slurtlehat.en: That could sure keep a noggin safe.
slurtlehat.trans: 那个确定能确保脑瓜安全。

pig_token.en: Looks like something those pigs would make.
pig_token.trans: 看起来像是那些猪会做的东西。

carnivaldecor_banner_kit.en: Maybe I've been overreactin'. A little decoration won't do any harm, eh?
carnivaldecor_banner_kit.trans: 也许我反应过度了。小小的装饰也没坏处，诶？

unpowered.en: I don't think it's turned on.

generic.en: This might feel a little funny, Luce.
generic.trans: 你可能会感觉有点怪，露西。

picked.en: Thank you for your sacrifice, tree.

generic.en: Those mushrooms look mighty tasty.
generic.trans: 那些蘑菇看起来超好吃。

imprisoned.en: Whatever he's got better not be contagious.
imprisoned.trans: 他身上那东西最好别传染。

generic.en: Not even so much as a "thank you", eh?
That's a curious statue, eh?

empty.en: It had some cool things inside, eh?
empty.trans: 里面肯定有过很酷的东西，是不是？

archive_centipede.en: I think we might be tresspassin'.
archive_centipede.trans: 我们可能闯到别人家了。

valid.en: Looks like this one's already set.
valid.trans: 看起来这个已经弄好了。

mastupgrade_lamp_item.en: That'll lighten things up around here.
mastupgrade_lamp_item.trans: 有了那个能把这里照的亮一点。

off.en: Gotta be a way to turn it on.

gestalt_guard.en: Looks like these things are getting stronger.
gestalt_guard.trans: 看来这些东西是越来越强了。

yoth_chair_rocking_item.en: Might be nice for stress relief.

firestarter.en: What's with the fires lately, bud?
firestarter.trans: 伙计，最近那些火是怎么回事？

ghost.en: With a heart you'll be feelin' like your mighty self in no time.
ghost.trans: 有了心，你会很快感受到强大的自我。

murderer.en: Your spear versus my axe, let's see whatcha got, eh!
murderer.trans: 你的长矛对抗我的斧子，看看你有什么本领，嗯！

attacker.en: %s has raiding and looting on the brain...

reviver.en: I'm glad you're on our side, %s.
reviver.trans: 很高兴你站在我们这边，%s。

generic.en: %s! Hey bud!

pickaxe.en: Almost an axe, but not quite.
pickaxe.trans: 和斧子差不多，但不完全是斧子。

antliontrinket.en: Could give it to some sandy hoser.
antliontrinket.trans: 可以把它送给有沙的傻子。

match_but_snack.en: Is this gonna be enough food?

mismatch.en: I don't think it wants this.
mismatch.trans: 它应该不想要这种食物吧。

generic.en: I'd say it looks good enough to offer.
generic.trans: 我觉得它看上去是足够好的供品。

generic.en: I'm from a Commonwealth, myself.
generic.trans: 我自己也是来自英联邦的。

burnt.trans: 不好意思你的王座没了。

cooking_long.en: It'll be a bit longer, eh?

empty.en: It seems a waste to just leave it sitting there, empty.
empty.trans: 就这样把它放在这儿，也不煮东西，好像挺浪费的。

mermguard_lunar.en: Those eyes have seen some things.
mermguard_lunar.trans: 这双眼睛见过一些事情。

armordreadstone.en: Lucy says black ain't my colour.

chesspiece_malbatross.en: I'm not puttin' that anywhere near my base.
chesspiece_malbatross.trans: 这东西我可不会放在我的基地附近。

yotb_sewingmachine_item.en: Let's get this up and running, eh?

onion_seeds.en: Looks like new crop seeds to me.
onion_seeds.trans: 我看像是新的农作物种子。

burning.en: Who's the hoser that set my garden on fire?
burning.trans: 哪个混账放火烧了我的园子？

growing.en: Hey, I think it's grown a bit!

full_weed.en: Whoops, looks like I've been tendin' to a weed this whole time.
full_weed.trans: 哎呀，看来我一直照料的都是一株野草。

rotten_oversized.en: The only thing it's good for is compost.
rotten_oversized.trans: 唯一的作用就是拿来堆肥。

generic.en: A plant, eh?

playbill_the_doll.en: The theater ain't really my sorta thing.

ancientfruit_gem.en: Maybe roasting it will soften it up, eh?

held.en: Want a peek at our prisoner, Lucy?
held.trans: 想要看一眼我们的犯人吗，露西？

generic.en: Degenerate.

fishmeat_cooked.en: I wish I had some chips.

held.en: What do I do with this, eh?
held.trans: 你说我该怎么处置这小东西呢？

generic.en: That'll take a pint out of me!
generic.trans: 那东西吸了我一品脱的血！

somehoney.en: I could get more if I waited.
somehoney.trans: 如果再等等，我可以收获更多的。

generic.en: Buzzers!

nohoney.en: I'm getting hungry just looking at it.

wall_scrap_item.trans: 墙发出臭味是正常的吗？

wagboss_robot_constructionsite_kit.en: How does all that fit in here?
wagboss_robot_constructionsite_kit.trans: 这么多东西怎么塞进去的？

oceanfish_medium_9.en: You'd go well with a nice maple glaze... if we had any maple here.
oceanfish_medium_9.trans: 如果这里有枫树的话，你会和枫树糖浆搭配得很好。

oceanfish_medium_8.en: You'd be right at home in the Great White North.
oceanfish_medium_8.trans: 你很适合加拿大堆满雪的大北方。

oceanfish_medium_7.en: Sorry bud, but your whiskers don't hold a candle to mine.
oceanfish_medium_7.trans: 抱歉伙计，你那点胡子还是跟我的没法比。

oceanfish_medium_6.en: Sorry bud, but your whiskers don't hold a candle to mine.
oceanfish_medium_6.trans: 抱歉伙计，你那点胡子还是跟我的没法比。

oceanfish_medium_4.en: Don't recall ever trying catfish. First time for everything!
oceanfish_medium_4.trans: 我还没吃过鲶鱼。凡事都有第一次！

oceanfish_medium_3.en: Never seen a fish so pointy before.
oceanfish_medium_3.trans: 我从没见过这么尖的鱼。

wathgrithr_shield.en: That'll take a lickin', eh Luce?

oceanfish_medium_1.en: Yeesh, if I weren't so hungry I'd throw it right back.
oceanfish_medium_1.trans: 咦，要不是饿，我就直接扔回水里了。

blowdart_yellow.en: Gross bird parts made an okay weapon, I guess.
blowdart_yellow.trans: 我猜恶心的小鸟各部分会制成一个不错的武器。

lightflier.en: Keep lighting my way and we'll get along just fine, bud!
lightflier.trans: 继续照亮我的路，我们会相处得很好，伙计！

generic.en: I'd hate to be on the receivin' end of that thing.
generic.trans: 我可不想被这东西伤到。

quagmire_potato.trans: 我爱吃优质的本地农产品。

lavaarena_healinggarlandhat.en: That'll make ya quick on yer feet.
lavaarena_healinggarlandhat.trans: 那个能让你的脚步变得轻快。

broken.en: That'll need more than a roll of duct tape to fix.
broken.trans: 那需要不止一卷的牛皮胶布来修理。

staffed.en: I'm happy to just leave it there for now.
staffed.trans: 现在我很开心自己把它留在那里。

generic.en: I'd rather not muck with that if I can help it.
generic.trans: 如果我能帮忙，我宁愿不弄脏。

yotr_decor_1_item.en: Alright Luce, where should we put it?

rhinodrill.en: They really like bumping chests like that, eh?
rhinodrill.trans: 他们还真喜欢那样捶胸口，是吧？

spiderden.en: Holy Mackinaw! Look at that thing!

generic.en: Well, if it doesn't work I could always use it as an anchor.
generic.trans: 好吧，如果它不起作用，我还可以把它当锚用。

activated.en: Now all I've gotta do is sit back, eh?
activated.trans: 现在我只要舒舒服服地坐着就好，诶？

phlegm.en: I wouldn't want that in my moustache.
phlegm.trans: 我不想它黏在我的小胡子上。

eggplant.en: I bet the birds have something to do with this.
eggplant.trans: 我打赌这些鸟肯定和这有关系。

chesspiece_twinsofterror.en: They make a good lookin' statue, eh?

book_temperature.en: I'm alright with the cold, but summers ain't fun under all this hair.
book_temperature.trans: 天冷在我这儿不算事，但我夏天比较难受，因为毛发密。

plant.en: I know a plant when I see one. This's an impostor!
plant.trans: 是不是植物，我一看就知道。这很明显是个冒充植物的家伙！

dirt.en: Be wary of the moving ground.

carnivaldecor_plant.en: This better not attract any smaller birds...

hungry.en: I'll get you something to eat soon, buddy.
hungry.trans: 我很快就会给你搞点吃的，伙计。

starving.en: He's got a hankering for some poutine!
starving.trans: 他渴望来点肉汁奶酪薯条！

generic.en: Where I try to make birds reform their evil ways.
generic.trans: 我用来让臭鸟们反省自己恶行的地方。

sleeping.en: They look so innocent when they dream.
sleeping.trans: 它们睡着了之后倒是看起来很无辜。

occupied.en: Think aboot what you've done, bird!
occupied.trans: 想想你都做过些什么吧，臭鸟！

onion_oversized.en: What do you think Luce, wanna help me chop that? I was only kidding!
onion_oversized.trans: 你觉得呢，露西，要不要帮我切一下？我只是在开玩笑！

fish_box.en: Reminds me of the old salmon fisheries.
fish_box.trans: 让我想起了那个旧三文鱼场。

held.en: She's none too pleased with her situation.
held.trans: 她对自己的处境很不满意。

generic.en: That bee doesn't seem as friendly.
generic.trans: 那只蜜蜂好像不太友好。

chesspiece_daywalker2.en: He keeps coming back for more, eh?
chesspiece_daywalker2.trans: 他没完没了地回来找麻烦，诶？

bloom.en: I like the colour of this one.

generic.en: Maybe I should chop it.

acidcovered.en: All the same to me. Let's get to choppin'.
acidcovered.trans: 对我来说都一样。咱们开砍吧。

featherpencil.en: The bird murder wasn't even necessary. Heh.
featherpencil.trans: 猎杀鸟的人甚至都没必要。嘿。

yotb.en: That judge might have something to say aboot it.
yotb.trans: 那个评委可能想点评一下它。

generic.en: Now that's cute. Don't you think, Luce?

beast_blueprint.en: Our beast is lucky it ended up being our friend and not our dinner, eh?
beast_blueprint.trans: 我们的野兽能跟我们做朋友，没有变成我们的晚餐已经是走大运了，诶？

burnt.en: Eh... maybe living in a tree ain't all it's cracked up to be.
burnt.trans: 诶……也许住在树上也不像传闻的那么好。

generic.en: Huh. I wonder what it might be like to live in a tree.
generic.trans: 哈。我想知道住在树上会是什么感觉。

overloaded.en: Worked a little too hard, eh?

generic.en: Pretty odd looking gadget there.

book_sleep.en: The perfect book for a full moon.

critter_bulbin.en: Sure got a spring in your step, eh?
critter_bulbin.trans: 你步子迈得还挺有劲，诶？

saddle_basic.trans: 是的，那个会帮助我们到那里。

generic.en: Stay away from me, bug!

sleeping.en: We should get it while it's sleeping.
sleeping.trans: 咱们趁着睡着，给它做掉。

recharging.en: Doesn't look like it's doing much right now.

generic.en: That's a pretty fancy lookin' clock.

lunarplant_kit.en: That should patch things up easy enough, eh?
lunarplant_kit.trans: 这东西很轻松就能把物品修补好，是吧？

playing.en: All that beautiful wood wasted on carving birds...
playing.trans: 这么好的木材居然浪费在了雕刻鸟类上……

generic.en: You want somethin' shiny? How aboot my shiny axe!
generic.trans: 你想要闪亮的东西吗？我这把闪亮的斧头怎么样？

monstertartare.en: Isn't there anything else to eat?
monstertartare.trans: 还有其他东西可以吃吗？

messagebottleempty.en: Wish it was filled with maple syrup...
messagebottleempty.trans: 要是里面有枫糖浆就好了……

generic.en: That carrot's a rat!

book_horticulture_upgraded.en: They sure gotta make gardening complicated, eh?
book_horticulture_upgraded.trans: 他们就非得把种地也搞复杂吗，诶？

malbatross_feather.en: I don't trust anything that comes from a bird.
malbatross_feather.trans: 我不信任鸟身上掉下来的任何东西。

yoth_lance.en: That's right, Luce. It can't chop a tree.
yoth_lance.trans: 没错，露西。它可砍不了树。

kitcoon_rocky.en: Well yer just too cute, aren'tcha?
kitcoon_rocky.trans: 你咋这么让人心疼昵，啊？

boatrace_start.en: A boat race? If you want a challenge, try log rolling.
boatrace_start.trans: 划船比赛？你想要玩玩挑战的话，试试滚木吧。

blowdart_lava.en: I'm not much of a shot.
blowdart_lava.trans: 我扔吹箭的技术一般般。

moose_nesting_ground.en: Where's the pyromaniac? This needs to burn.
moose_nesting_ground.trans: 放火狂在哪里？得把这个烧掉。

wobster_moonglass.en: Huh. Don't recall them looking like that.
wobster_moonglass.trans: 哈。记得它们不是长这样啊。

twiggy_nut_sapling.en: One day it'll make good chopping.
twiggy_nut_sapling.trans: 有一天它会优秀伐木工。

farm_soil_debris.en: I'd better clear that out of the way.
farm_soil_debris.trans: 我还是把它清理走的好。

bullkelp_root.en: Seems a bit cruel, doesn't it?

cookiecuttershell.en: He was a tough nut to crack.

earmuffshat.en: Where I'm from these'd only work in the fall.
earmuffshat.trans: 在我的家乡，这种东西只在秋天管用。

spider_dropper.en: They're smart to live away from the corruption.
spider_dropper.trans: 它们很聪明，知道要远离腐烂物。

alterguardian_phase3dead.en: Guess that takes care of that!

shadowthrall_wings.en: You're not some kinda bird hiding under that hood, are ya?
shadowthrall_wings.trans: 你总不会是一只藏在罩子下面的鸟吧？

sleep.en: Just follow me, I'll give ya plenty of logs to pick up.
sleep.trans: 跟着我，我会丢不少木头给你捡。

generic.en: Just follow me, I'll give ya plenty of logs to pick up.
generic.trans: 跟着我，我会丢不少木头给你捡。

generic.en: I don't trust anything that can't decide between air and water.
generic.trans: 我不相信任何不能决定在水里还是在陆地上生活的生物。

generic.en: Walruses are nearby, eh?

empty.en: This won't be safe come winter.
empty.trans: 这在冬天会变得不安全。

fireballstaff.en: I'll leave it to someone more magic-inclined.
fireballstaff.trans: 我还是把它留给比较喜欢魔法的人吧。

cookedmandrake.en: Was that a bad thing to do?
cookedmandrake.trans: 我是不是不应该那样做？

treegrowthsolution.en: The bigger the tree, the better to chop down!
treegrowthsolution.trans: 树越大，砍倒就越有成就感！

eyeturret_item.en: This needs to be installed properly.

fence_rotator.en: Sometimes you've gotta show a fence who's boss, eh?
fence_rotator.trans: 有时你得让栅栏知道谁是老大，诶？

wx78module_heat.trans: 胡里花哨的机器人零件。

grassgator.en: Can't tell if it's an animal or a real lively shrub.
grassgator.trans: 分不清它是动物还是活泼的灌木。

moqueca.en: My mouth is watering just looking at it.
moqueca.trans: 只是看着它我的口水就流个不停。

telestaff.en: I wonder what this thing does.
telestaff.trans: 我很好奇这东西干什么用的。

yotr_token.en: It doesn't feel polite to smack someone with a glove...
yotr_token.trans: 拿手套抽打别人感觉不礼貌……

kabobs.en: The stick really adds to the flavour.
kabobs.trans: 树枝确实让肉变得更香了。

molehat.trans: 现在就算是夜间我也能砍树了！

tentaclespike.en: It wobbles when you wave it.
tentaclespike.trans: 这玩意挥舞起来还在左摇右摆呢。

fence_item.en: A good project for a lazy afternoon.
fence_item.trans: 慵懒的午后的一个不错的项目。

slurperpelt.trans: 离这最近的毛皮交易商在哪里？

quagmire_oven_item.en: Be careful around that fire, Lucy.
quagmire_oven_item.trans: 在火旁边可要小心呀，露西。

saltlick.en: My mouth's dry just looking at it.
saltlick.trans: 只是看着它我的嘴巴就干了。

generic.en: Careful Lucy, wouldn't want you to rust.

empty.en: It's no good to me like that.

chesspiece_wagboss_lunar.en: That was a bad one... and weird.
chesspiece_wagboss_lunar.trans: 那玩意儿够呛……还特邪门。

merm_toolshed_upgraded.en: Looks like where the scaly folks keep their tools.
merm_toolshed_upgraded.trans: 看样子像是那些鳞片人放工具的地方。

generic.en: Naps are important during a long day of chopping.
generic.trans: 长时间砍树之后，打个盹儿是很有必要的。

malbatross_feathered_weave.en: Why'd we go and ruin this perfectly good canvas?
malbatross_feathered_weave.trans: 咱们为什么要毁了这么好的帆布？

bearger_fur.en: It's as thick as my head!

dumbbell_redgem.en: Yer muscles won't be the only things on fire.
dumbbell_redgem.trans: 你的肌肉不是唯一燃烧的地方。

eel.trans: 这烹饪出来应该挺不错的。

trunk_cooked.en: I think it boiled off all of the nose cheese.
trunk_cooked.trans: 我想所有鼻涕应该都煮掉了吧。

waxed_plant.en: It won't wither away, but it also won't be growing anytime soon.
waxed_plant.trans: 它不会枯死，但最近应该不会再长了。

diviningrodstart.trans: 那根棒子看起来好奇怪。

pondeel.trans: 这烹饪出来应该挺不错的。

spider_water.en: I respect its affinity for giant trees.
spider_water.trans: 我敬重它与巨树之间的亲近。

doll_blueprint.en: I can doll it up all I want, it'll still be a beefalo.
doll_blueprint.trans: 不管我怎么打扮，它终究就是头皮弗娄牛。

boat_bumper_crabking.en: There ya go, nice and safe.

acorn_cooked.en: What a waste of a perfectly good tree.
acorn_cooked.trans: 真是浪费了这么好的树。

quagmire_spotspice_ground.en: You only need a pinch to get the flavour.
quagmire_spotspice_ground.trans: 只要一点点，味道就会出来。

spider_healer_item.en: Looks like food for a bug.
spider_healer_item.trans: 看起来像是虫子吃的食物。

ghost.en: That soul sapper's lookin' like a real sap now.
ghost.trans: 这下消停了吧。

firestarter.en: You better not burn any of my precious trees!
firestarter.trans: 你可注意点别烧着了我宝贵的树木！

murderer.en: I'll hang those horns on the wall of my cabin!
murderer.trans: 我要把这对角挂在我柜子上面的墙上！

attacker.en: Trust me, you ain't got the chops, %s.
attacker.trans: 相信我，就你那两把板斧不行的，%s。

reviver.en: That was mighty kind of you, %s.

generic.en: %s, buddy, hey!

dock_woodposts_item.en: Looking at 'em is making me hungry.
dock_woodposts_item.trans: 看着它们都把我看饿了。

firestarter.en: You'll not want to be burning things, bud.
firestarter.trans: 伙计，你不会想要烧东西。

ghost.en: Lucy says I have to help you, %s. Let's get goin'.
ghost.trans: 露西说我必须帮助你，%s。我们开始吧。

murderer.en: Yer still a hoser! Now it's choppin' time!
murderer.trans: 你还是傻子一个。是时候砍砍砍了！

attacker.en: %s'll end up on the wrong end of my axe if he's not careful...
attacker.trans: 要是%s不小心就会死在我斧子的另一端...

reviver.en: You're growin' on me, %s. Like a fungus.

generic.en: Hey %s, how you doin' ya big hoser?

purebrilliance.en: Makes me feel a bit twitchy.

mask_treehat.en: Now this one I kinda like.

carnivaldecor_lamp_kit.en: Might as well get it set up, eh?

inground.trans: 它们有自己的作息规律。

generic.en: It's a red mushroom.

gravy.en: It really floats my gravy boat.

reviving.en: What in the name of sweet Celine?
reviving.trans: 我的席琳啊，这是闹哪出？

generic.en: What's that Luce? Yup, she'll look great on the wall.
generic.trans: 你说啥，露西？对，她挂在墙上应该会很好看。

maxwellphonograph.en: Better than most of the stuff on the radio.
maxwellphonograph.trans: 比收音机上听到的大多数东西都要好。

junk_pile.en: Wouldn't hurt to root around there a bit, eh?

decor_lamp.en: I'd rather have natural light, but it'll do.
decor_lamp.trans: 要我选，我肯定选自然光，但它勉强也能凑合。

generic.en: Let's see what we can find, eh?
generic.trans: 咱们看看能找到什么，诶？

wagdrone_parts.trans: 这些零件会派上用场的。

upgraded_stacksize.en: It's a bit much, eh? But at least it stores a lot.
upgraded_stacksize.trans: 过头了点吧，诶？不过起码能装不少东西。

generic.en: Gaudy if you ask me.
generic.trans: 要我说这东西太华而不实了。

i_won.en: I knew you could do it, bud!
i_won.trans: 我一早就知道你行，伙计！

someone_else_won.en: {winner} sure gave us the run-around, eh?

generic.en: Can't have a race without a finish line.
generic.trans: 没有终点线，就比不了赛。

unwritten.en: Let's give our neighbours some guidance.
unwritten.trans: 让我们给邻居一点指引。

burnt.en: Wood is the best at burning.

generic.en: Is there anything wood can't do?
generic.trans: 有什么东西是木头不能做成的吗？

nitre_formation.en: Guess that rain wasn't all bad, eh?
nitre_formation.trans: 我猜那场雨也并不全是坏事，对吗？

lightninggoathorn.en: I'm sure the goat didn't need it.
lightninggoathorn.trans: 我相信山羊不需要这个。

yotr_decor_2_item.en: Alright Luce, where should we put it?

quagmire_carrot_seeds.en: Looks like new crop seeds to me.
quagmire_carrot_seeds.trans: 我看像是新的农作物种子。

book_fossil.en: I'm leaving that to the experts.

beeswax_spray.en: Lucy says she likes my own woody musk.
beeswax_spray.trans: 露西说她喜欢我身上的木质（伍迪）香。

ready.en: Is stone supposed to move like that?
ready.trans: 石头应该像那样移动吗？

covered.en: Once you've seen one weird statue, you've seen'em all.
covered.trans: 一旦你看到一个怪异的雕像，你就看到它们所有了。

finished.en: Just needed a little duct tape.

chestupgrade_stacksize.en: Guess this thing will hollow out more space in my storage chest?
chestupgrade_stacksize.trans: 我猜这东西能把我的储藏箱掏出更多空间？

turf_sinkhole.trans: 我是在地下发现这个的。

chesspiece_pawn.trans: 实际上只是个谦卑的乡下人。

moonglass.en: It's green, like a nice leaf.

yotb_stage.en: There's something off aboot that booth.
yotb_stage.trans: 那个地摊看起来有问题。

funny.en: Eh... Should we try again, Lucy?
funny.trans: 呃……我们应该再试一次吗，露西？

generic.en: Still got some work to do, looks like.
generic.trans: 看起来还有些工作要做。

mask_ancient_masonhat.en: I bet the owner could have carried a few logs.
mask_ancient_masonhat.trans: 我打赌它的主人没少扛过木头。

quagmire_potato_seeds.en: Looks like new crop seeds to me.
quagmire_potato_seeds.trans: 我看像是新的农作物种子。

carnivalgame_herding_kit.en: Those good-for-nothing birds can't even set up their own carnival?
carnivalgame_herding_kit.trans: 那些一无是处的鸟儿们连自己的嘉年华都不会建？

warglet.en: Think you can mess with me, eh?

record_end.en: This gets me all fired up.

burnt.en: Whose bright idea was it to kill the lights?
burnt.trans: 是谁想出灭掉亮光这个好主意的？

on.en: Soak in that all-natural light, Lucy.
on.trans: 沉浸在那完全天然的亮光中，露西。

hermit_cracked_pearl.en: I was only trying to help...

goldenpitchfork.en: Welp. I can't unmake it, so...
goldenpitchfork.trans: 好吧。既然我没法让它消失，那么...

critter_perdling.en: Look, it's not you. It's me.
critter_perdling.trans: 注意一下，不是你，而是我。

kelp_cooked.en: Good eatin' right there, if you ask me.

kitcoonden_kit.en: Working with wood is what we do best, right Luce?
kitcoonden_kit.trans: 咱们最拿手的就是木工，对不，露西？

oceanfishinglure_spinner_blue.en: This'll be sure to reel them in, eh?
oceanfishinglure_spinner_blue.trans: 这下肯定能钓到鱼了，对不？

generic.en: All my buddies could be improved with wood.
generic.trans: 我所有的伙伴可以用木材改善体质。

powcake.en: I like the ones made with real sugar better.
powcake.trans: 我更喜欢用真正的糖做成的蛋糕。

recharging.en: Doesn't look like it's doing much right now.

generic.en: That's a pretty fancy lookin' clock.

alterguardianhatshard.en: I'm sure it's still good for somethin'.

smallghost.en: Hey little buddy, you need some help?
smallghost.trans: 嘿，小家伙，你需要帮忙吗？

oceanfishinglure_hermit_rain.en: Guess there's fish to be caught, rain or shine.
oceanfishinglure_hermit_rain.trans: 不管刮风下雨，鱼都能钓上来。

builtup.en: It looks like a real home now.

generic.en: This place has seen better days.

battlesong_fireresistance.en: Don't recognize the song. Maybe it wasn't released in Canada.
battlesong_fireresistance.trans: 听不出这首歌。也许它没在加拿大发行。

generic.en: That's not really my sort of thing, eh?
generic.trans: 那真不是我干的事情，嗯？

quagmire_sapbucket.en: Didn't I tell everybody trees were delicious?
quagmire_sapbucket.trans: 难道我没告诉大家，这些树很美味？

generic.en: That's one funny looking gadget.
generic.trans: 那个小工具的样子很逗。

activated.en: Maybe you should keep your distance, Luce.

shadowheart.en: Yeesh. Don't get that near me.

sweettea.en: Almost makes me forget where I am.
sweettea.trans: 几乎让我忘记了我在哪。

generic.en: That looks like a bum!

open.en: I'm not sure I want to look at that, eh?
open.trans: 我不确定自己是否真的想进去看看，你说呢？

battlesong_instant_panic.en: I can't sit and watch a play when there's wood to be chopped!
battlesong_instant_panic.trans: 有木头要砍的时候，我不能坐着看戏!

quagmire_altar_queen.en: That must have taken some time to make.
quagmire_altar_queen.trans: 制作它肯定花了不少时间。

moon_altar_icon.en: You want me to get you home, eh?
moon_altar_icon.trans: 你想让我送你回家吧，诶？

cursed_monkey_token.en: I know a curse when I see it.
cursed_monkey_token.trans: 诅咒这玩意，我一眼就能认出来。

carrat_ghostracer.en: That thing's giving me the creeps.

stump.en: This is not the work of an axe.

generic.en: Whoa, Lucy. This is not your kind of tree.
generic.trans: 哇，露西。这不是你喜欢的那种树。

mermwatchtower_noking.en: Feels like they're waiting for something.
mermwatchtower_noking.trans: 感觉他们在等什么事情发生。

quagmire_key_park.en: Oh beauty, now we can open the gate.
quagmire_key_park.trans: 哦，美人，我们现在可以开门了。

wall_ruins_item.trans: 呵，又是石头做成的，是吗？

tourtiere.en: If only I had some ketchup!
tourtiere.trans: 要是我有番茄酱就好了！

trap_bramble.en: A trap for the forest, by the forest.
trap_bramble.trans: 森林制作，放置在森林的陷阱。

held.en: I've got a pocket full of sunshine!
held.trans: 我口袋里面装满了阳光！

generic.en: Reminds me of Algonquin park.
generic.trans: 让我想起了阿冈昆公园。

wall_hay_item.trans: 它打个喷嚏都能把它弄倒。

wagboss_robot.en: Aw, Luce. I don't think it chops trees.
wagboss_robot.trans: 唉，露西。我觉得它不会砍树。

blackflag.en: I like my flags with a maple leaf on 'em.
blackflag.trans: 我喜欢我的旗子上有枫叶。

alterguardian_contained.en: Guess he couldn't have brought that sooner, eh?
alterguardian_contained.trans: 他就不能早点拿来么，诶？

roastturkey.en: My favourite kind of bird is a roasted one.
roastturkey.trans: 我最喜欢的鸟就是烤熟的鸟。

gelblob_storage_kit.en: I have bad memories of that gunk.
gelblob_storage_kit.trans: 我还没忘掉那糟糕的黏胶。

vault_orb.trans: 不晓得这玩意是干啥的。

held.en: One day this might be a tree.
held.trans: 有一天它可能会长成一棵树的。

generic.en: A flying blue pinecone!
generic.trans: 一颗漂浮着的蓝色松果！

spoiled_fish.en: I think it's time to throw this out.
spoiled_fish.trans: 我觉得是时候把这个东西扔掉了。

burning.en: Nooo! I could have chopped it!
burning.trans: 不！我本来可以把它砍掉的！

generic.en: It's calling to me!

animal_track.en: A large woodland creature passed this way!
animal_track.trans: 有一只大型林地生物从这走过！

wagboss_robot_leg.en: No you can't chop it in half, Lucy. It's too tough even for you.
wagboss_robot_leg.trans: 别琢磨着把它一劈两半了，露西。那玩意硬，你砍不动的。

flint.en: This could be an axe head.

wx78module_maxhunger.trans: 胡里花哨的机器人零件。

quagmire_pebblecrab.en: I don't see any reason to bother the poor fella.
quagmire_pebblecrab.trans: 我觉得没什么理由去折腾那可怜的家伙。

alterguardian_phase1_lunarrift.en: Looks meaner this time eh, Luce?
alterguardian_phase1_lunarrift.trans: 这次看着更凶了，诶，露西？

walterhat.en: Lookit that, it's got a little maple leaf on it!

generic.en: You want somethin' shiny? How aboot my shiny axe!
generic.trans: 你想要闪亮的东西吗？我这把闪亮的斧头怎么样？

battlesong_durability.en: Don't recognize the song. Maybe it wasn't released in Canada.
battlesong_durability.trans: 听不出这首歌。也许它没在加拿大发行。

oceanfish_small_6.en: Eh, I could take it or leaf it.

oceanfish_small_5.en: Weird looking fish, but sure smells good.

dragonpie.en: Almost as good as butter tarts!
dragonpie.trans: 几乎和奶油蛋挞一样好吃！

oceanfish_small_8.en: Looks like the sun came out today after all.

oceanfish_small_7.trans: 这鱼长得还真俊，诶，伙计？

oceanfish_small_2.en: Just a tiny little guy, eh?

oceanfish_small_1.en: I was hopin' it'd be bigger.

beehive.trans: 它们在里面又舒适又惬意。

generic.en: He's doing the world a service.

burnt.en: Great, now those feathered hosers are gonna run wild.
burnt.trans: 太好了，现在那些有羽毛的傻子要到处乱跑了。

oceanfish_small_3.en: Doesn't look like there's a lot of meat on that one.

cookedmeat.en: Just like my dear old ma used to make.
cookedmeat.trans: 跟老妈以前做的一模一样。

ghost.en: Welp, that's the way the cookie crumbles.
ghost.trans: 玩脱了吧，凌乱的像饼干的碎屑。

firestarter.en: Watch that fire now, %s.
firestarter.trans: 注意火候，%s。

murderer.en: I'm gonna soufflé you alive!

attacker.en: Careful where you're swingin', %s.

reviver.en: %s is a stand up kinda guy.

generic.en: %s, buddy! How you doing?

sleeping.en: Do you think you're cute? You're not.
sleeping.trans: 觉得自己很可爱？可爱在哪。

generic.en: Filthy feathered menace.

record_efs.en: This gets me all fired up.

poweroff.en: Hey Lucy, maybe that's a way outta here!
poweroff.trans: 嘿，露西，也许那是一条出路！

generic.en: Guess that door's closed for good.
generic.trans: 我想那扇门已经永远关上了。

carrot_planted.en: I'm not one for vegetables, eh?
carrot_planted.trans: 我可不是素食主义者，你说呢？

firestarter.en: Hey, watch where you're burnin'!
firestarter.trans: 喂，不要乱点火！

ghost.en: I'm lookin' for a heart! Just give me a minute, eh?
ghost.trans: 我在找心脏了！给我一分钟，诶？

murderer.en: Lucy and I think it's time we put a stop to you, %s.
murderer.trans: 露西和我认为是时候制止你了，%s。

attacker.en: Yikes! She's got a suprisingly strong right hook.
attacker.trans: 呀！她的右勾拳出乎意料地强。

reviver.en: I'm sure glad you're here, %s.

generic.en: Aboot time you came by for a visit, %s!

carpentry_blade_moonglass.en: I know, Lucy. You're more versatile.
carpentry_blade_moonglass.trans: 我知道，露西。你更加多才多艺。

boat_bumper_kelp.en: There ya go, nice and safe.

ghostlyelixir_shadow.trans: 呼，闻起来像是放了一星期的红三文鱼！

malbatross_beak.en: Yeesh, there's still some feathers stuck to it.
malbatross_beak.trans: 咦，上面还连着几根羽毛。

merm_armory_upgraded.trans: 我们在这不受欢迎，露西。

batnose_cooked.en: Nothing worse than a cold nose.
batnose_cooked.trans: 没有什么比冷的鼻子更糟糕的了。

houndwhistle.en: I usually do my own animal calls.
houndwhistle.trans: 我通常会自己召唤动物。

beefalotreat.en: How aboot I give my beefalo something tasty to munch on, eh?
beefalotreat.trans: 让我的皮弗娄牛啃点好吃的东西，诶？

generic.en: I don't like the looks of that.

uncommon.en: I'm not keeping that thing around.
uncommon.trans: 我不会把那东西留在身边。

rare.en: Maybe I'll give it to Willow. She'll know what to do with it.
rare.trans: 也许我该把它交给薇洛。她会知道该怎么做的。

generic.en: Those birds are mockin' me, I just know it.
generic.trans: 那些鸟在嘲笑我，我就知道。

gift.en: They're just as fun to give as they are to receive.
gift.trans: 它们被给予或被接受都很有趣。

carnival_prizebooth_kit.en: I'm only setting this up out of curiosity.
carnival_prizebooth_kit.trans: 我只是出于好奇才造这个的。

alterguardianhat.en: It's a pretty handy headpiece, could do without the whisperin' though.
alterguardianhat.trans: 方便的头盔，要是别总嘀咕就好了。

compost.en: Can't say much for the food, but I like the presentation!
compost.trans: 东西不知道咋样，但是样子我很喜欢！

generic.en: Would ya look at that.

empty.en: I think it needs meat, Lucy.

quagmire_mealingstone.en: We just gotta grind and bear it.

marbleshrub.trans: 当然没有办法切碎那东西。

cannonball_rock_item.en: I sure wouldn't want one of these fired at my boat.
cannonball_rock_item.trans: 这东西可别轰到我的小船。

balloonparty.en: Uh oh, I didn't forget someone's birthday did I?
balloonparty.trans: 呃哦，我没有忘记某人的生日吧？

winter_ornament.en: For hanging on the unchopped tree with care.
winter_ornament.trans: 用来悉心地挂在没有被劈砍的树上。

pepper_oversized.en: That looks like a big case of heartburn just waiting to happen.
pepper_oversized.trans: 谁要吃了这个估计得喷火。

cookiecutter.en: That thing's hankering for a bite of my boat!
cookiecutter.trans: 那东西渴望着咬一口我的小船！

wasphive.en: Why are those bees so angry?
wasphive.trans: 那些蜜蜂为什么这么生气？

balatro_machine.en: I know I promised, Luce. Just one more.
balatro_machine.trans: 我知道我保证过，露西。我这回就再多玩一把。

saddle_war.en: Makes me feel like a Mountie.
saddle_war.trans: 让我感觉像个加拿大骑警。

perogies.trans: 我称它们为“好吃的饺子”。

dumbbell_gem.en: Choppin' trees is enough of a workout for me.

yotb.en: That judge might have something to say aboot it.
yotb.trans: 那个评委可能想点评一下它。

generic.en: Now that's cute. Don't you think, Luce?

yotd_anchor_item.en: A little elbow grease and we'll have an anchor.
yotd_anchor_item.trans: 稍微出点力，咱们就能做出来个船锚了。

tree_rock_sapling.en: I can't wait to see it full grown...
tree_rock_sapling.trans: 我实在等不及看它长成大树了……

record_dawn.en: What a nifty number, eh Luce?

generic.en: It's just as spooky in the day.

ghost.en: With a heart you'll be tip-top in no time, %s.
ghost.trans: %s，有了心，你马上又可以容光焕发了。

firestarter.en: Should you be setting fires, little buddy?
firestarter.trans: 小家伙，你应该放火吗？

murderer.en: Hereeee's Woodie!

attacker.en: %s, I can't believe what I just SAW! Wait, no...
attacker.trans: %s，我无法相信我刚看到的！等等，不…

reviver.en: %s! You're doin' great, little buddy.

generic.en: %s! Hi little buddy!

shell_cluster.en: I almost hate to break up such a tight-knit bunch.
shell_cluster.trans: 抱团的这么紧，我都有点不想分开它了。

asparagus_oversized.en: It almost looks like a proper tree.
asparagus_oversized.trans: 它看起来几乎像一棵树。

spear.en: It lacks the heft of a good solid axe.
spear.trans: 比起一把坚实的好斧子，它的重量还轻了点。

generic.en: Let's hit the ground running, eh?

cookbook.en: Pretty handy. Luce, how aboot you read off the ingredients while I cook?
cookbook.trans: 挺管用的。露西，我做饭，你来给我念食谱怎么样？

potato.trans: 我爱吃优质的本地农产品。

redgem.en: I see within it the fiery death of a thousand trees.
redgem.trans: 我在它里面看到了成千棵树在熊熊烈火中死去。

lots.en: It's doing real well on its own.
lots.trans: 就它而言，真的做得不错。

some.en: There we go. Everyone needs a bit of help sometimes.
some.trans: 这就好。大家有时候都需要别人搭把手。

snowcovered.trans: 每个人都有困难的时候，嗯？

rotten.trans: 那块腐烂的木头需要替换。

burnt.en: If a log burns in the forest does it hurt my feelings? Yes. It does.
burnt.trans: 如果一块木头在森林里燃烧，这会伤害我的感情吗？是的，会。

empty.en: It needs a bit of help getting started.

mermguard_shadow.en: There's no quit in these fellas.

generic.en: He's a whole lotta backbacon.

wagstaff_npc.en: Looks like you're doing somthin' important. How aboot I lend you a hand, eh?
wagstaff_npc.trans: 你好像在做重要的事情。要不要我帮你，诶？

boat_ancient_item.en: This boat's made of some solid old-growth lumber.
boat_ancient_item.trans: 这艘船是用坚固的老生木材建的。

dumbbell_marble.en: I'll stick to lifting my axe.

minerhat.en: Down deep in a coal mine.

leafymeatburger.en: It never tastes the same as actual meat...
leafymeatburger.trans: 味道和真正的肉是不一样的……

book_elemental.en: I'd rather stick with my axe, thanks.
book_elemental.trans: 算了，我还是只用我的斧头就好。

latkes.en: I'll never say no to potatoes.

generic.en: Some sort of sandy transportation.

chesspiece_guardianphase3.trans: 讨厌鬼变成装饰品了，诶？

eyeplant.en: It needs to mind its own business.
eyeplant.trans: 它应该管好自己的事情。

healingstaff.en: Someone else'd put that to better use.
healingstaff.trans: 那个在别人手里会比较有用。

coontail.en: That's the end of that cat's tale.

generic.en: I'm not eating honey off the ground.
generic.trans: 我没有从地上捡蜂蜜吃。

carnivalgame_shooting_kit.en: Those good-for-nothing birds can't even set up their own carnival?
carnivalgame_shooting_kit.trans: 那些一无是处的鸟儿们连自己的嘉年华都不会建？

moonstorm_goggleshat.en: If it works, I'm not gonna complain.
moonstorm_goggleshat.trans: 要是能管用的话，我就不抱怨了。

stalker_minion.en: Ain't no reason for that to exist.

bird_egg.en: There's a bird in there, thinking evil bird thoughts.
bird_egg.trans: 那里面有只满脑子邪恶思想的鸟。

sleeping.trans: 睡着了就别去打搅，对不？

generic.en: I don't want nothing to do with whatever that is.
generic.trans: 我不想跟它扯上任何关系。

generic.en: That carrot's a rat!

lore2.en: Someone... or something did a number on them.
lore2.trans: 不晓得是人……还是什么东西把他们收拾惨了。

lore3.trans: 了不得了。巨型武装白蚁。

lore1.en: Oh geez, he's rotten to the core.

anchor_item.en: A little elbow grease and we'll have an anchor.
anchor_item.trans: 稍微出点力，咱们就能做出来个锚了。

yellowgem.en: I can see the stars in it.
yellowgem.trans: 我可以看到它里面有星星在闪。

atrium_overgrowth.en: It probably said something important. Oh well.
atrium_overgrowth.trans: 它可能说了什么重要的事。噢，好啊。

basalt.en: That rock ain't going to move.
basalt.trans: 那块岩石是不会移动的。

mushtree_moon.en: I think it's due for a choppin'.
mushtree_moon.trans: 长到了该砍掉的时候了。

tacklestation.en: Been a while since I went on a fishing trip.

growing.trans: 你看着它的话就会感觉它一点都没长。

withered.en: It's got no life left, eh?

generic.en: I wonder what it will be.
generic.trans: 我想知道它会长成什么。

quagmire_pot_hanger_item.en: Gotta hang the pot on the fire somehow.
quagmire_pot_hanger_item.trans: 要想办法把锅子架在火上。

inert.en: Think that castle might be missing a gem or two, eh?
inert.trans: 那个城堡缺了几颗宝石，是不是？

generic.en: I think we might've bothered him.
It's growing up to be a jerk, just like its parents.
generic.trans: 它将来也会长成一个混球，就像它的父母一样。

greenmooneye.en: That should help everyone get the lay of the land.
greenmooneye.trans: 那应该能帮助每个人了解地形。

krampus_sack.en: Seems wrong to take someone else's sack.
krampus_sack.trans: 带走其他人的背包是不对的。

held.en: One day this might be a tree.
held.trans: 有一天它可能会长成一棵树的。

generic.en: We've been visited by a forest sprite, Lucy!
generic.trans: 我们收到了一位森林精灵的邀请，露西！

awake.en: I really wish I hadn't seen that.
awake.trans: 我真希望我没有看到那东西。

halloweencandy_8.en: I'll tell you what it tastes like, Lucy.
halloweencandy_8.trans: 我会告诉你它尝起来怎么样，露西。

slurtleslime.trans: 看来有人需要一张纸巾。

koalefant_winter.en: They get tastier in the winter.

mask_dollhat.en: There's somethin' funny aboot that mask.

gingerbreadwarg.en: Not like any dog I've ever seen.

halloweencandy_2.en: Don't worry, I'll eat enough for the both of us, Lucy.
halloweencandy_2.trans: 不要担心，我会把你那份也一起吃了，露西。

generic.en: It's supposed to keep our lunch from spoiling, eh?
generic.trans: 它可以防止我们的午餐变质是吗？

recharging.en: Doesn't look like it's doing much right now.

generic.en: That's a pretty fancy lookin' clock.

halloweencandy_5.en: These ones don't puke. I like 'em.
halloweencandy_5.trans: 这些不会呕吐。我喜欢它们。

halloweencandy_6.trans: 不确定那是不是食物，嗯？

halloweencandy_3.en: Just a regular ol' cob of corn.

halloweencandy_4.en: Yeesh. That's a lot of candy legs.

wx78module_music.trans: 胡里花哨的机器人零件。

starving.en: Skinnier than a blue heron's legs.

generic.en: That's my lil critter.

ceviche.en: I'd be loonie not to eat this.

salty_doghat.en: At least it doesn't attract birds.

blueamulet.en: Just need a tasty beverage to cool now, eh?
blueamulet.trans: 现在只需要美味的饮品就可以冷静下来，额？

bushhat.en: It's good for hiding from nature.
bushhat.trans: 这是与大自然融为一体的好办法。

cookiecutterhat.en: Hope this shell protects me better than it protected the last guy.
cookiecutterhat.trans: 希望这个壳子保护我比保护它上一个主人好一点。

bananapop.trans: 我更喜欢吃冰镇枫糖浆...

bootleg.en: How aboot we leg it out of here, eh?
bootleg.trans: 咱们拿这腿退出去怎么样，诶？

lightcrab.en: The little fella's just minding its own business.
lightcrab.trans: 这小家伙在忙自己的事。

moon_fissure_plugged.en: Guess sometimes stubbornness pays off, eh Lucy?
moon_fissure_plugged.trans: 有时候固执也是有回报的，诶，露西？

upgraded_stacksize.en: Lots of storage, made of quality wood, what more could you ask for?
upgraded_stacksize.trans: 储物空间大，木材质量好，你还能要求啥？

burnt.en: I guess wood does have a downside...
burnt.trans: 我猜木头也有不好的一面...

generic.en: Wood is so handy! Look at all the things you can make!
generic.trans: 木头太有用处了！看看所有这些用木头做的东西就知道了！

boat_ancient_container.en: Should help keep everything safely stowed away.
boat_ancient_container.trans: 这下能把东西收拾放好了。

grass_umbrella.en: That there could keep my beard moderately dry, eh?
grass_umbrella.trans: 这可以让我的胡子保持适度干燥，是吧？

sleep.en: Fine, as long as it don't start no forest fires.

generic.en: Fine, as long as it don't start no forest fires.

off.en: Does it look like it's working, Lucy?
off.trans: 露西，这东西是在工作么？

lunarplant_husk.en: That could be good for somethin'.

quagmire_pot_small.en: I only know a handful of recipes, but I'm real good at them.
quagmire_pot_small.trans: 我只会做那么几道菜，但是手艺不太好。

yotb_stage_item.en: I should get that set up if we want to start the contest.
yotb_stage_item.trans: 要想比赛的话，我得先建好那个。

halloween_ornament_2.en: That's nice. I should hang it somewhere.
halloween_ornament_2.trans: 真漂亮。我应该把它挂在某个地方。

halloween_ornament_3.en: This would look good in a tree somewhere.
halloween_ornament_3.trans: 把它挂在树上会很好看。

generic.en: You ain't gettin' far without a good sense of direction.
generic.trans: 没好的方向感谁都走不远。

lunarthrall_plant.en: Looks like an invasive species to me.

halloween_ornament_6.en: Argh! I'd sure like to hang a real one like that.
halloween_ornament_6.trans: 唉！要是有个真的那种东西让我挂起来就好了。

generic.en: I'm not giving anything to those birds!
generic.trans: 我不会把任何东西给那些鸟！

empty.en: Could use a touch of green.

nightmaregrowth.en: Somethin' tells me that's not part of the natural environment.
nightmaregrowth.trans: 直觉告诉我，它不是自然长出的东西。

webber_spider_minion.en: Better small spiders than big, I suppose.
webber_spider_minion.trans: 小蜘蛛比大蜘蛛好，我猜。

cutreeds.en: Want to hear my loon call?

yotc_carrat_gym_speed_item.en: I'd better find a place to set this up.
yotc_carrat_gym_speed_item.trans: 最好找个地方把它弄好。

generic.en: Better look sharp.

turtillus.en: Gotta keep that one from hiding, eh?
turtillus.trans: 要组织那家伙躲藏，对吧？

book_moon.en: I'm getting goosebumps just lookin' at it.
book_moon.trans: 我看一下就浑身鸡皮疙瘩了。
