shadowdigger.en: Are your little buddies, uh... alive?
shadowdigger.trans: 你的小伙伴，嗯哈…还活着吗？

generic.en: I should probably leave that alone.

goatmilk.en: I think the electricity curdled it.
goatmilk.trans: 我觉得是电让它凝结的。

lunarplanthat.en: It's got me feelin' a bit light-headed.
lunarplanthat.trans: 它让我感到有点头晕目眩。

turfcraftingstation.en: I think I'd make a good groundskeeper, whatcha think Luce?
turfcraftingstation.trans: 我想我是个不错的园丁，你觉得呢，露西？

generic.en: It's a... magic thing, I think.
generic.trans: 我想这应该是个...有魔法的东西。

spice_sugar.en: I prefer my syrup to be maple.

houndbone.en: It's covered with dog spit, eh?
houndbone.trans: 上面都是狗狗唾液，对吗？

generic.en: Keep flapping, little guy!
generic.trans: 继续拍打翅膀不要停，小家伙！

greenamulet.en: I get a bit of a weird feeling around these things.
greenamulet.trans: 我觉得这些事情很奇怪。

thurible.en: Someone's trying to give us a leg up.
thurible.trans: 有人正在尝试助我们一臂之力。

otter.trans: 别过来，你这个贪心的小捣蛋。

shadow_forge.en: Was this really a good idea?

chesspiece_kitcoon.en: Usually somethin' like this would be carved outta wood.
chesspiece_kitcoon.trans: 一般这种东西都是拿木头来雕。

quagmire_crabmeat_cooked.en: I wouldn't mind a taste of that.

watermelon.en: How can it be both water and melon?
watermelon.trans: 一个瓜怎么能含那么高的水分呢？

veggie_oversized_rotten.en: The only thing it's good for is compost.
veggie_oversized_rotten.trans: 唯一的作用就是拿来堆肥。

ancient_husk.en: I can't even begin to understand what happened here.
ancient_husk.trans: 我完全闹不清是怎么回事。

stalker.trans: 这是一堂行走的解剖课。

portabletent_item.en: A portable tent! Why didn't we think of that, Luce?
portabletent_item.trans: 便携式帐篷！我们怎么就想到，露西？

dug_berrybush.trans: 是时候进行点园林绿化了。

moonglass_rock.en: That's a big hunk of moon stuff.

scraphat.en: Anything to protect the ol' dome, eh?
scraphat.trans: 管是啥，能护住脑袋就行，诶？

unwritten.en: Let's give our neighbours some guidance.
unwritten.trans: 让我们给邻居一点指引。

burnt.en: Wood is the best at burning.

generic.en: Let the wood guide the way.

ghost.en: Someone should rub a heart on %s.
ghost.trans: 应该有人擦下%s的心。

firestarter.en: Was that blaze some sort of experiment, %s?
firestarter.trans: %s，那场大火是某种实验吗？

murderer.en: Enemy of the forest!

attacker.en: You haven't been very gentlemanly lately, %s.

reviver.en: %s, you're an alright guy.

generic.en: %s! Hey buddy!

quagmire_wheat_seeds.en: Looks like new crop seeds to me.
quagmire_wheat_seeds.trans: 我看像是新的农作物种子。

remains_eye_bone.en: This used to be an eyebone.

remains_glommerflower.en: This used to be a slimy flower.
remains_glommerflower.trans: 这曾经是一朵黏滑的花。

generic.en: It's all burnt up.

burnt.en: It looks a bit crispier than usual.

generic.en: It's good to be ready for anything at sea.
generic.trans: 要防备海上可能会出现的各种问题。

leafymeatsouffle.en: I wouldn't touch that with a ten foot pike pole.
leafymeatsouffle.trans: 就算给我跟三米长的杆子，我都不要碰它。

firepen.en: Keep it away from the trees!

moon_altar_seed.en: It wants me to take it to one of those cracks in the ground.
moon_altar_seed.trans: 它想让我把它放进地上的裂缝里。

generic.en: It's like havin' our own shipping depot.
generic.trans: 这就像是自己的运输仓库。

durian_seeds.trans: 或许我可以把它们种起来？

pomegranate_cooked.en: This would go good on flapjacks.
pomegranate_cooked.trans: 把这个放在煎饼上应该会很好。

beardhair.en: My hair's not that colour. Not my beard, anyway.
beardhair.trans: 我的毛发不是这个颜色。总之这不是我的胡子。

cookedmonstermeat.en: I still don't want to eat it.

type3.en: Could make a nice planter outta that.
type3.trans: 可以从那东西种出一棵不错的植物。

type2.en: I'm not sure I get it.
type2.trans: 我不确定我是否理解了。

type1.en: She's a real tall one, eh?

generic.en: Looks pretty fancy.

potatosouffle.en: Lucy and I will clean up, since Warly did the cooking.
potatosouffle.trans: 露西跟我就洗碗吧，因为是沃利做的饭。

carnival_host.en: There's just somethin' aboot him I don't trust...
carnival_host.trans: 我怎么看他怎么不对劲……

eyeofterror_mini.trans: 盯着看是不礼貌的，对不？

aboveground.en: It feels aboot rocks the way I feel aboot trees.
aboveground.trans: 石头对于它就像是树木对于我一样。

alterguardian_phase2spike.en: It's trying to fence us in!
alterguardian_phase2spike.trans: 它想用篱笆把我们圈起来！

saltbox.en: It's like an icebox, but salt!
saltbox.trans: 就像冰箱一样，但是是盐！

ghostlyelixir_revive.trans: 呼，闻起来像是放了一星期的红三文鱼！

icecream.trans: 我砍了足够的树后才会吃！

has_item.en: Hey, yer covering up that quality wood!
has_item.trans: 嘿，你遮住了那块优质的木头了！

generic.en: That's a nice wood grain, eh?

walkingplank.en: Hopefully we don't have to abandon ship.

merm_tool_upgraded.en: Better, but why is it all slimy?
merm_tool_upgraded.trans: 好多了，但为什么都是黏糊糊的？

treasurechest_trap.en: Something is not quite right aboot that chest.
treasurechest_trap.trans: 那个箱子有点不太对劲。

held.en: You'll pay for your crimes, crow!

generic.en: He's planning something. I can tell.
generic.trans: 他正在谋划些什么。我看得出来。

oceanfishingbobber_canary.en: Hmph. Guess birds are good for some things.
oceanfishingbobber_canary.trans: 嗯。看来鸟也不是一无是处。

cane.en: It's good for the back country.
cane.trans: 这可以帮助我重返故土。

diseased.en: It's caught a bit of a bug.

withered.trans: 和艾伯塔平原一样干燥。

generic.en: I see a snack.

sleepbomb.en: Some folks around here could use the shuteye.
sleepbomb.trans: 周围的一些人可以利用睡着的人。

wormlight_lesser.en: Wrinklier than the underside of a beaver.

carnival_ball.en: Would've preferred a hockey puck, but this'll work.
carnival_ball.trans: 虽然我更喜欢冰球，但这也能凑活吧。

generic.en: That's a whole lotta wet.

empty.en: There's nothin' but dirt here.

sword_lunarplant.trans: 我还是更喜欢我的斧头。

yotb.en: That judge might have something to say aboot it.
yotb.trans: 那个评委可能想点评一下它。

generic.en: Now that's cute. Don't you think, Luce?

voidclothhat.en: A dark hood, full of secrets.

bird_mutant.en: I always knew they were evil.
bird_mutant.trans: 我一早就知道它们不是什么好鸟。

opalstaff.en: Err, moon magic isn't really... my thing... Heh.
opalstaff.trans: 呃，月亮魔法真心不是……我的菜……嘿。

ghostflowerhat.trans: 俺不是不敢戴,露西。纯纯就是没那种感觉。

orangemooneye.en: Makes the hairs on the back of my neck stand up.
orangemooneye.trans: 让我脖子后面的毛发都竖立起来了。

pumpkin_oversized.en: I'd be happier if it was a giant pumpkin pie.
pumpkin_oversized.trans: 如果是一个巨大的南瓜派，我会更高兴。

generic.en: I miss horses.

snowball_item.en: The kids always used to aim for my head.
snowball_item.trans: 小孩们以前总瞄着我的脑袋扔。

shadowthrall_hands.en: You'd better keep yer hands clear of my axe!
shadowthrall_hands.trans: 你的手最好离我的斧头远点！

lunarrift_portal.en: It's givin' me goosebumps... I hate goosebumps.
lunarrift_portal.trans: 它让我起鸡皮疙瘩……我恨鸡皮疙瘩。

slingshotmodkit.en: Kid is getting fancy with that slingshooter.
slingshotmodkit.trans: 这小子耍弹弓越来越利索了。

low.en: There should be some wood around here somewhere.

embers.en: I should go chop some wood for that, eh?
embers.trans: 我应该去砍点木头来，是吧？

generic.en: It uses wood.

out.en: If only I had some wood.

koalefig_trunk.en: I'm the one who's gonna be stuffed if I eat that whole thing.
koalefig_trunk.trans: 我要是把那玩意全吃完了，我才会是被塞满的那一个。

normal.en: I love a cold fire in the evening.
normal.trans: 我喜欢在晚上点一堆冰火。

low.en: I should probably do something aboot that, eh?
low.trans: 我是不是应该做点什么，嗯？

generic.en: This'll make it feel more like home.
generic.trans: 有了这个，这里就更像家乡了。

out.en: It was good while it lasted.
out.trans: 它还是燃着的时候比较好。

generic.en: I like the look of that!

glasscutter.en: I feel pretty safe with it in my hand.

generic.en: Not exactly a barrel of maple syrup...
generic.trans: 这可不是什么枫树糖浆桶……

axe.en: It's not as nice as Lucy.

winter_ornamentpearl.en: Aww, it would look nice in my cabin.
winter_ornamentpearl.trans: 啊，它放在我的小屋里会很好看。

boat_bumper_crabking_kit.en: A bit of padding might be a good idea.
boat_bumper_crabking_kit.trans: 找点东西垫着可能不错。

generic.en: It could use some wood to burn.
generic.trans: 可以加点木头来点燃它。

generic.en: It could use some wood to burn.
generic.trans: 可以加点木头来点燃它。

quagmire_goatmum.en: We're in for a baa'd time.
quagmire_goatmum.trans: 我们将要迎来羊羊不得意的时期。

lit.en: Gleamin' like a sunrise over a glacier.
lit.trans: 就像冰川上的日出一样闪闪发光。

generic.en: It could use some wood to burn.
generic.trans: 可以加点木头来点燃它。

battlesong_shadowaligned.en: Don't recognize the song. Maybe it wasn't released in Canada.
battlesong_shadowaligned.trans: 听不出这首歌。也许它没在加拿大发行。

charging.en: Let me guess, it doesn't ship to Canada.
charging.trans: 让我猜猜，送货范围不包括加拿大。

charged.en: Let me guess, it doesn't ship to Canada.
charged.trans: 让我猜猜，送货范围不包括加拿大。

generic.en: Let me guess, it doesn't ship to Canada.
generic.trans: 让我猜猜，送货范围不包括加拿大。

off.en: Does it look like it's working, Lucy?
off.trans: 露西，这东西是在工作么？

generic.en: What do you have for us, eh?
generic.trans: 那你给我们备了个啥，诶？

empty.en: Well, what do you want?

hot.en: I could chop all winter with that in my pocket!
hot.trans: 有这东西在我口袋里，我可以砍一整个冬天的树！

generic.en: We call those "night rocks" back home.
generic.trans: 在家乡，我们管这种东西叫“夜石”。

bonesoup.en: I could always go for a nice hearty soup.

mapscroll.en: Is it still a map if nothing's on it?
mapscroll.trans: 如果上面没有任何东西，它还算是一张地图吗？

mutator_spitter.en: Sorry little buddy, I think I'll have to pass.
mutator_spitter.trans: 对不起，小家伙，俺不吃这玩意。

lureplantbulb.trans: 它真暖和，而且是块状的。

wx78module_maxsanity.trans: 胡里花哨的机器人零件。

quagmire_portal.en: Looks like we're going nowhere fast, Lucy.
quagmire_portal.trans: 露西，看起来咱们只能待在原地了。

has_food.en: Yep. That's some good lookin' food.
has_food.trans: 好啊。这食物看着真不错。

burnt.en: Guess that's one way to clear the dishes, eh?

generic.en: We having company?

mushroombomb.en: I don't like the look of that.

voidcloth_scythe.en: Luce says she doesn't like him.

spring.trans: 既没有东西进去也没有东西出来。

generic.en: I doubt there are trees down there.
generic.trans: 我很怀疑那下面到底有没有树。

generic.en: Just a little starfish, eh?

firestarter.en: Keep those flames away from my trees!
firestarter.trans: 不要让那些火焰靠近树！

ghost.en: First we'll get you a heart, then we'll get you some bacon, eh %s?
ghost.trans: 我们先给你拿到心，然后给你一些培根，好吧%s？

murderer.en: You're MIME now, %s!

attacker.en: %s could learn some manners...

reviver.en: %s, you're an alright guy.

generic.en: %s! How ya doin', buddy?

somehoney.en: I could get more if I waited.
somehoney.trans: 如果再等等，我可以收获更多的。

generic.en: So that's where those bees are comin' from!
generic.trans: 所以蜜蜂是从这里来的啊！

nohoney.en: I'm getting hungry just looking at it.

burning.en: Never seen such a flammable fishbowl!
burning.trans: 就没见过这么容易着火的鱼缸！

generic.en: Think it's time for some fishin', eh?
generic.trans: 到了打渔的点儿了，对不？

leif_sparse.en: I'm sorry aboot all of those trees!
leif_sparse.trans: 我很抱歉我对那些树做的事！

fence_electric_item.en: I suppose I could plant it.

koalefant_carcass.en: Looks like somethin' else got to it first.

yotr_food3.en: Looks like it's got a little snowcap on top.

yotr_food2.en: Whew. It's not givin' me the transformation tingles.
yotr_food2.trans: 呼哟。竟然没让我有那种变身的刺痛。

yotr_food1.en: Rabbits love carrots so much, they'll even put 'em in cakes.
yotr_food1.trans: 看来兔子还真爱吃胡萝卜，居然连蛋糕里都加。

transistor.trans: 我甚至都不会假装明白它的工作原理。

monkey.en: Well then. That's a new one.

book_rain.en: Could've really used this when I was livin' on the West Coast.
book_rain.trans: 我在西海岸住的时候有它就好了。

waiting.en: I wonder if it will ever wake up again.
waiting.trans: 不知道它还会不会再醒过来。

generic.en: No one ever told him it was rude to stare.
generic.trans: 从来没有人告诉过他，盯着别人看是不礼貌的。

fruitflyfruit.en: Those Fruit Flies seem to have a real liking for it.
fruitflyfruit.trans: 那些果蝇似乎很喜欢它。

bodypillow_beefalowool.en: It's not filled with goose down, is it?
bodypillow_beefalowool.trans: 它不是用鹅绒填充的吗？

merm_prince.en: This guy's really the best you got, eh?

deer_antler.en: Wish I still had a cabin I could mount these things in.
deer_antler.trans: 真希望我还有一个小屋能把这些东西装进去。

whip.en: I hope that doesn't end up hurtin' any lil critters.
whip.trans: 我希望这东西最后不会伤害任何小生物。

frogfishbowl.en: I'm not one to turn my nose up at a meal.

mosquitomusk.en: A stuffed skeeter? This is what the kids like these days, eh?
mosquitomusk.trans: 填充蚊子？现在的小孩就喜欢这种东西，诶？

walkingplank_grass.en: Hopefully we don't have to abandon ship.

desiccant.en: Remember how much it rained back home, Luce?
desiccant.trans: 记得老家雨多大吗，露西？

ghostflower.en: That ghost left a parting gift.
ghostflower.trans: 那个鬼临走时还留下个礼物。

firestarter.en: Careful around those open flames, Ma'am.
firestarter.trans: 女士，请小心这些明火。

ghost.en: You know where I can get a heart, %s?
ghost.trans: %s，你知道哪里可以拿到心吗？

murderer.en: This is gonna be a clear cut!

attacker.en: %s should read an etiquette book once in awhile.
attacker.trans: %s应该偶尔看看关于礼仪的书。

reviver.en: That's some good work ya did, Ma'am.

generic.en: %s. Ma'am.

waterplant_bomb.en: You're just asking to be chopped!
waterplant_bomb.trans: 你这简直就是等着被斧子砍下来！

melted.trans: 在家乡，它们绝不会融化的。

generic.en: Home sweet home!

crabking_claw.en: Not the best time to make snap decisions, eh?

veggieomlet.en: Veggies? Did we run outta bacon and potatoes?
veggieomlet.trans: 蔬菜？培根和土豆全吃完了？

waterballoon.en: Could be fun times lobbin' these around.
waterballoon.trans: 把这些东西抛来抛去应该挺好玩的。

wortox_reviver.en: That might be useful in a pinch.
wortox_reviver.trans: 那东西应该能派上用场。

bodypillow_kelp.en: At least it's not filled with feathers.

mastupgrade_lamp_yotd.en: It's mighty nice lookin' up there.

recharging.en: Doesn't look like it's doing much right now.

generic.en: That's a pretty fancy lookin' clock.

mast_malbatross_item.en: Guess even a bird can be useful once in a while.
mast_malbatross_item.trans: 看来就连小鸟偶尔也是有用的。

scanning.en: Whew... almost mistook you for a bird, little fella.
scanning.trans: 呼……还以为你这个小家伙是只鸟呢。

hunting.en: Whew... almost mistook you for a bird, little fella.
hunting.trans: 呼……还以为你这个小家伙是只鸟呢。

generic.en: Whew... almost mistook you for a bird, little fella.
generic.trans: 呼……还以为你这个小家伙是只鸟呢。

open.en: It looks like Sudbury down there.
open.trans: 下面看起来好像加拿大的萨德伯里。

generic.en: There're probably no trees down there anyway.
generic.trans: 不管怎样，那下面可能没有任何树。

full.en: More crowded than a Toronto subway!
full.trans: 比多伦多的地铁还拥挤！

spear_wathgrithr.en: Who needs a spear when you got ol'Luce?
spear_wathgrithr.trans: 有了老露西时，谁还需要长矛？

ghostlyelixir_attack.trans: 呼，闻起来像是放了一星期的红三文鱼！

nightmarepie.en: Whatcha think, Lucy? Should we try a bite?
nightmarepie.trans: 露西，你怎么看？咱们要不要吃一口？

mutator_water.en: Sorry little buddy, I think I'll have to pass.
mutator_water.trans: 对不起，小家伙，俺不吃这玩意。

rocks.en: Could make a decent little inukshuk with these.
rocks.trans: 用这些东西可以做成一个不错的小因努伊特石堆。

kitcoon_deciduous.en: You look like you could use some pats, eh?
kitcoon_deciduous.trans: 你是想让俺摸摸你吗，诶？

guano.en: It stinks less than the other kind.

archive_moon_statue.en: The ones carryin' the full moon sure got the short end of the stick, eh?
archive_moon_statue.trans: 那些有满月的不如其他的，对不？

peghook.en: That acid'll be a problem, eh?

molehill.en: I bet it's just a pile of rocks inside.
molehill.trans: 我敢打赌里面只是一堆石头。

monstermeat_dried.en: I still don't want to eat it.

lavaarena_battlestandard.trans: 让我们切碎那面战斗旗帜！

support_pillar_dreadstone_complete.en: She'll take a few swings, eh, Luce?
support_pillar_dreadstone_complete.trans: 它能承受住几次摇晃，对吧露西？

saltlick_improved.en: I gave it a lick or two. It was okay.

some_flowers.en: Think it could use a few more flowers, eh?

generic.en: Better pay our respects, eh Lucy?
generic.trans: 我们也表示下敬意吧，露西？

quagmire_swampig.en: They seem like an alright sort.

dock_kit.en: I can see it now, the whole ocean covered in beautiful timber...
dock_kit.trans: 我已经能看到整片海都被美美的木头覆盖的景象……

mast_malbatross.en: I don't like the look of it.

quagmire_saltrock.en: Maybe I could chop it into smaller bits.
quagmire_saltrock.trans: 也许我可以把它劈成小块。

bomb_lunarplant.en: Let's kick things off with a bang, eh?
bomb_lunarplant.trans: 让我们轰轰烈烈地开始吧，诶？

amulet.trans: 应该总是准备一个备用计划。

ripe.trans: 你一直都这么五彩缤纷吗？

generic.en: Just a sweet little critter.

diseased.en: It's caught a bit of a bug.

withered.en: It's perished from the heat, eh?

generic.en: Saskatoon berries?

barren.trans: 它需要有充足养分的粪便肥料。

sculpture_rooknose.en: Just a big hunk of marble, that.

bat.en: Who taught that rat to fly?
bat.trans: 是谁教会那只老鼠飞的？

refined_dust.en: Looks kind of like maple sugar. Don't think I wanna eat it, though.
refined_dust.trans: 看起来有点像枫糖。不过别以为我会吃。

buzzard.en: Stay away from those meat snacks!

shadowthrall_mouth.en: Yeesh, that smile is giving me the creeps.
shadowthrall_mouth.trans: 是的，那个笑容让我毛骨悚然。

purpleamulet.en: The sparkle is gone from the gem.

pepperpopper.en: Hoo! That's a hot one, eh?

boatrace_checkpoint.en: Keep your eye on the next checkpoint, Luce!
boatrace_checkpoint.trans: 留意下一个检查点的方向，露西！

fence_gate_item.en: A good project for a lazy afternoon.
fence_gate_item.trans: 慵懒的午后的一个不错的项目。

walkingplank_yotd.en: You can fancy it up, but I still don't want to use it.
walkingplank_yotd.trans: 管你把它弄得多花哨，我就是不想用。

orangeamulet.en: This'll make the chores go by quicker!
orangeamulet.trans: 这可以让家务活完成得更快！

quagmire_wheat.en: Such a fancy shade of gold.

mushroomhat.en: That there'll make you one with the forest.
mushroomhat.trans: 那会让你成为森林的一员。

salsa.en: Lucy'll give ya a hand chopping veggies next time, eh bud?
salsa.trans: 露西下回帮你切菜，是不，伙计？

nutrientsgoggleshat.en: This thing sure helps take the guesswork out of gardening.
nutrientsgoggleshat.trans: 有了这东西种起地来就不用靠猜了。

minifan.en: I'm not used to the heat in this place!
minifan.trans: 我不习惯这地方的高温！

wounded.trans: 你碰上什么麻烦了呀，姐妹？

tapped_empty.trans: 慢慢装着，像糖蜜那么慢。

stump.trans: 在它最茁壮的时候割下。

tapped_bugs.en: Hey, get away from that tree will ya!
tapped_bugs.trans: 嘿，你们离那棵树远点儿！

generic.en: It's beautiful!

playing.en: I'm supposed to hit the one that looks like a bird, right?
playing.trans: 我应该打那个看起来像鸟的，对吗？

generic.en: What kinda horrible bird secrets are they hiding down there...
generic.trans: 它们在下面藏了什么可怕的鸟秘密……

winter_ornamentlight.en: What do you think, Lucy? Decorate, or chop?
winter_ornamentlight.trans: 你怎么想，露西？装饰一下或者砍掉？

hermit_pearl.en: C'mon Lucy, let's find that crab!

You can't make a coffee table out of gold.
Well, maybe you can. But you shouldn't.

你没法用黄金做成咖啡桌。

generic.en: That's nice.

burnt.en: So that's why I smelled smoke.

generic.en: Now that's cute. Don't you think, Luce?

generic.en: Reeds.

goldenaxe.en: It's almost as nice as Lucy.

livingtree_root.en: Hey there's a piece of wood in there.

generic.en: I don't trust all this science stuff.

burning.en: It's the safest thing to do.

reviving.en: I was afraid that might happen!

generic.en: That's unfortunate.

generic.trans: 想起咱们建的第一所房子没，露西？

golden_farm_hoe.trans: 既然做出来了，就用它吧。

ghost.en: C'mon, bud, let's get you on your feet.

murderer.en: You'll not strong arm me, %s!

generic.en: That's my buddy, %s! Hey!

boat_bumper_yotd.en: Everyone will be givin' this boat a wide berth alright.

ghostlyelixir_lunar.trans: 呼，闻起来像是放了一星期的红三文鱼！

battlesong_instant_revive.en: Don't recognize the song. Maybe it wasn't released in Canada.

opalpreciousgem.en: You're fond of it, aren'tcha Lucy?

inground.trans: 它们有自己的作息规律。

generic.en: It's a green mushroom.

playing.en: Seeing those things run around gives me the willies.
playing.trans: 看到这些东西跑来跑去，我感到很不舒服。

generic.en: You want somethin' shiny? How aboot my shiny axe!
generic.trans: 你想要闪亮的东西吗？我这把闪亮的斧头怎么样？

armordragonfly.en: Plaid is all the armor I need.

generic.en: Yup, empty.

rock_avocado_fruit_ripe.en: I think I could sink my teeth into it now.

little_walrus.en: Why are they so far south?
little_walrus.trans: 它们为什么要住在这么偏南的地方？

playing.en: Those birds are trying to trick me... but I'm smarter...

generic.en: What kinda horrible bird secrets are they hiding down there...
generic.trans: 它们在下面藏了什么可怕的鸟秘密……

trunkvest_winter.en: This could stand up to the winters back home, eh?

chesspiece_daywalker.en: Not lookin' so tough now, eh?

lucky_goldnugget.en: I could use a bit of luck.

oceanfishinglure_spoon_blue.en: This'll be sure to reel them in, eh?
oceanfishinglure_spoon_blue.trans: 这下肯定能钓到鱼了，对不？

me.en: That is throwin' me for a loop, Luce.
me.trans: 给我有点整的不会了，露西。

generic.en: You're not yourself lately.
generic.trans: 你最近有点不像你自己了。

charlie_stage_post.en: I don't like being put in the spotlight.
charlie_stage_post.trans: 我不喜欢被放在聚光灯下面。

battlesong_sanityaura.en: Don't recognize the song. Maybe it wasn't released in Canada.
battlesong_sanityaura.trans: 听不出这首歌。也许它没在加拿大发行。

bibingka.en: It's got a nice flavour to it.

twiggy_nut.en: With a little care, this could make fer some good choppin'.
twiggy_nut.trans: 稍加留意，树可以更好砍断。

soil_amender_fermented.en: Yup, that right there's the good stuff!
soil_amender_fermented.trans: 是的，发酵出来好东西了！

rock.en: I could break it down if I tried hard enough.
rock.trans: 如果足够用劲的话，我应该可以把它凿碎。

alterguardian_phase1_lunarrift_gestalt.en: That must be what he's looking for.
alterguardian_phase1_lunarrift_gestalt.trans: 那多半就是他要找的东西。

ghost.en: Boo! Ha ha!
ghost.trans: 嘣！哈哈！

mast_yotd.en: Awfully flashy, but it gets the job done, eh?
mast_yotd.trans: 虽然胡里花哨，但终归能完成任务，诶？

yellowamulet.en: I could cut wood at night with this.
yellowamulet.trans: 有了这个东西，晚上我也可以砍树了。

shadowthrall_horns.en: Better not get too close to that big fella.
shadowthrall_horns.trans: 最好不要离那个大个子太近。

lost_toy_1.en: There's something unnatural aboot that thing... wouldn't ya say, Luce?
lost_toy_1.trans: 那东西有点不自然……对不，露西？

lost_toy_2.en: There's something unnatural aboot that thing... wouldn't ya say, Luce?
lost_toy_2.trans: 那东西有点不自然……对不，露西？

pigelite4.en: Something aboot that guy I like.
pigelite4.trans: 那个家伙有什么特别的地方让我很喜欢。

oar_driftwood.trans: 很适合划船的一天，对不？

pigelite2.en: Too hot-headed if you ask me.
pigelite2.trans: 头脑发热，如果你问我的话。

lost_toy_7.en: There's something unnatural aboot that thing... wouldn't ya say, Luce?
lost_toy_7.trans: 那东西有点不自然……对不，露西？

dug_grass.trans: 它把我的眼泪都弄出来了。

piggyback.en: Used all the parts of the pig.
piggyback.trans: 使用猪身上的任何部分。

carrat_good.en: Not bad! Not bad at all!

carrat.en: Sorry bud, looks like you need more time at the gym.
carrat.trans: 抱歉了伙计，看起来你还得再练练。

burnt.trans: 哎呀，明明不到山火的季节啊！

generic.en: How aboot we see what our Carrat's made of, eh?
generic.trans: 来瞧瞧咱们的胡萝卜鼠有几斤几两，好不？

critter_eyeofterror.en: We'll have to get you some protective eye gear there, bud.
critter_eyeofterror.trans: 我们得给你准备一些防护眼罩，伙计。

carnivalgame_feedchicks_kit.en: Those good-for-nothing birds can't even set up their own carnival?
carnivalgame_feedchicks_kit.trans: 那些一无是处的鸟儿们连自己的嘉年华都不会建？

support_pillar_broken.en: Shucks, I came too late to yell "timbeerrrrr"!
support_pillar_broken.trans: 糟糕，我来得太晚了，来不及大喊“要倒啦”！

slingshot_handle_voidcloth.en: Kid is getting fancy with that slingshooter.
slingshot_handle_voidcloth.trans: 这小子耍弹弓越来越利索了。

1.en: You're almost as shaggy as me, buddy!
1.trans: 你几乎和我一样毛茸茸的，伙计！

2.en: You're almost as shaggy as me, buddy!
2.trans: 你几乎和我一样毛茸茸的，伙计！

book_web.en: I deal with spiders enough, I don't need to read aboot them too!
book_web.trans: 我和蜘蛛打交道已经够多了，就别再让我看蜘蛛的书了！

generic.en: Mushrooms don't have no reason to be that big.
generic.trans: 蘑菇有理由变得那么大。

atrium_statue.en: Was it supposed to be holding something?

generic.en: So that's where all my good boards went!!
generic.trans: 原来我那些好的木板都拿来建这个了！！

crabking_mob.trans: 看来到了螃蟹的季节了。

critter_dragonling.en: Don't start no forest fires now, buddy.
critter_dragonling.trans: 哥们，先别开始，现在没有森林火焰。

onion.en: I only cry tears of joy.
onion.trans: 我只会流出喜悦的泪水。

corn.en: I like it, but not in everything that I eat.
corn.trans: 我喜欢玉米，但它不是我最爱的食物。

yotr_fightring_kit.en: Alright Luce, where should we put it?

2.en: I wonder what they did wrong.
2.trans: 我想知道他们做错了什么。

3.en: Gotta be pretty angry to destroy someone's home.
3.trans: 一定是有很大的怒气，才会把人家的房子都毁了。

generic.en: Gonna be a bit longer.

critter_kitten.trans: 轻轻拍它真是令人放松。

palmconetree.en: We don't have these up North.

default.en: Poor %s. I should watch out for %s, eh?

noammo.en: I can't just load it with any old thing, eh?
noammo.trans: 也不是什么东西都能往里面塞的，诶？

ammoloaded.en: There's a big seabird out there I'd love to introduce you to.
ammoloaded.trans: 外面有一种大海鸟，我已经等不及给你们介绍了。

generic.en: Looks like it could do some damage... if it was actually loaded.
generic.trans: 好像如果装上弹的话，确实能轰出点动静……

normal.en: I love a fire in the evening.
normal.trans: 我喜欢在晚上点一堆营火。

low.en: I should probably do something aboot that, eh?
low.trans: 我是不是应该做点什么，嗯？

generic.en: Where's my guitar?

out.en: It was good while it lasted.
out.trans: 它还是燃着的时候比较好。

winter_food9.en: Psst, Lucy. Do I have a 'nog moustache?
winter_food9.trans: 喂，露西，我的胡子像木垛一样吗？

winter_food8.en: Perfect for drinking next to a good fire, eh?
winter_food8.trans: 更喜欢坐在不错的火焰旁喝酒，嗯？

moonglass_charged.en: These pieces still have a glow to 'em.

winter_food5.en: All the taste and none of the splinters!
winter_food5.trans: 所有的味道却没有碎片！

winter_food7.en: Doesn't fall far from the cider tree.
winter_food7.trans: 不会从远离苹果树的地方掉下来。

winter_food6.en: Hard to complain aboot this whole "Feast" business.
winter_food6.trans: 很难抱怨“盛宴”这整件事。

winter_food1.trans: 是个华而不实的伐木工人。

bishop_nightmare.en: I can see the internal workings!
bishop_nightmare.trans: 我可以看到它内部的零件！

moon_altar_rock_seed.en: There's a little whisper coming from inside.

winter_food2.en: Always had a soft spot for a good holiday cookie.
winter_food2.trans: 好吃的节日饼干，我都喜欢。

stalagmite.en: I'm not too interested in rocks.

record_dusk.en: What a nifty number, eh Luce?

green_cap.en: I've eaten stranger things in the woods.
green_cap.trans: 我曾经在森林里吃过更奇怪的东西。

icebox.trans: 啊—— 让我想起了家乡。

common.en: I'm not one for book learning.

rare.trans: 那东西看起来实在是复杂。

lava_pond.en: I wouldn't get too close to that, eh?
lava_pond.trans: 我不会靠那个太近的，不是吗？

chesspiece_yoth.en: It could be really mean when it wanted to be.

inactive.en: No, you can't smash it Lucy.
inactive.trans: 别，别总想着砸它个稀烂，露西。

friendly.en: Let's keep an eye on it, Luce.

damaged.en: We can fix her up or just take the spare parts.
damaged.trans: 咱们可以修好她，或者直接拆零件。

generic.en: They just come crawling back!

onemanband.en: I stand on guard for thee!

wagstaff_npc_mutations.en: Sounds like he could use our help, eh?

chesspiece_yotd.en: Some nice stonework. Would've looked even better carved outta pine.
chesspiece_yotd.trans: 石雕不错。要是用松木雕会更好看。

nightmarelight.trans: 这盏灯应该使用木材的。

book_horticulture.en: That's a lot of readin'... you sure it's the shorter version?
book_horticulture.trans: 好多字啊……你确定这个是缩减版？

catcoonhat.en: The traditional garb of the woodsman.

kelphat.en: Even when I take it off I can still imagine the texture.
kelphat.trans: 即便摘下来了，还是能感觉到。

generic.en: We gotta load it up with good eats.
generic.trans: 我们要给它摆满好吃的。

full.en: It hasn't finished the food we gave it.
full.trans: 它还没吃完我们给它的食物。

minotaurchest.en: That's a nice chest with horns, eh.
minotaurchest.trans: 很不错的带角箱子，是吧。

chesspiece_yots.en: It would've looked better carved out of wood.
chesspiece_yots.trans: 要是用木雕会好看不少。

beefalo_groomer_item.en: Better get that set up, eh?

moon_cap.en: Not sure if I should be eatin' that.
moon_cap.trans: 不知道我应不应该吃那个。

glommerfuel.en: Yep, his slime is slimy too.
glommerfuel.trans: 没错，他的黏液也黏乎乎的。

held.trans: 不要觉得太舒适了，臭鸟。

generic.en: What a snotty little jerk.

mermguard.en: They stand on guard for the king.

dragonfly.en: She'll burn all the trees before I can chop them!
dragonfly.trans: 在我把这些树砍倒之前，她会把它们全部烧掉的！

generic.en: Reminds me of home.

yotb_sewingmachine.en: I'm pretty handy with a sewing needle.

firestarter.en: Knock off the fire starting there, bud.
firestarter.trans: 兄弟，灭掉从这里开始烧起的火吧。

ghost.en: Someone should rub a heart on %s.
ghost.trans: 应该有人擦下%s的心。

murderer.en: Enemy of the forest!

attacker.en: %s isn't very polite...

reviver.en: %s, you're an alright sort.

generic.en: Look who it is! %s!

playing.en: It's too easy... what's the catch, eh?
playing.trans: 这太容易了……藏着什么陷阱吗，诶？

generic.en: You want somethin' shiny? How aboot my shiny axe!
generic.trans: 你想要闪亮的东西吗？我这把闪亮的斧头怎么样？

balloon.en: It's squeaky. Just like a real woodland creature.
balloon.trans: 它咯咯响。就像真正的林地生物。

costume_tree_body.en: It's not as scratchy as it looks.
costume_tree_body.trans: 它并不像看上去那样容易蹭破皮。

pottedfern.en: I do love me some plant life.

chesspiece_wagboss_robot.en: Remember when it tried to kill us, Luce?
chesspiece_wagboss_robot.trans: 还记得它追杀我们的时那股劲儿吗，露西？

fertilizer.en: Poop belongs in a bucket, not on the ground.
fertilizer.trans: 粪便应该放在桶里，而不是留在地上。

describe_plantstressed.en: Looks like there's a thing or two I should fix around here.
describe_plantstressed.trans: 这里有些需要我修好的东西。

spider_warrior.trans: 明天同一时间再战，是吗？

generic.en: I think that's enough.

pig.en: I thought that would go better.
pig.trans: 我原以为情况会好转的。

announce_mutated_buzzard_arrival.en: Those buzzards look different to you, Luce?
announce_mutated_buzzard_arrival.trans: 你看那些秃鹫有点不一样吧，露西？

3.en: You were right, Luce! They were hiding right here!
3.trans: 真给你蒙对了，露西！它们真藏在这！

4.en: So that's where you were hiding, eh?
4.trans: 原来你一直都藏在这啊，诶？

announce_oceanfishing_linesnap.en: Aw nuts! Sorry for the language, Luce.
announce_oceanfishing_linesnap.trans: 嗷，憨货！不应该破口大骂的，露西。

announce_detach_buff_sleepresistance.en: I'm gettin' tired, I think it's wearing off.
announce_detach_buff_sleepresistance.trans: 我开始累了，那东西开始失效了。

announce_flare_seen.en: I should go check out that flare, eh?
announce_flare_seen.trans: 我应该去看看那个信号，对不？

tallbirdegg_cracked.en: You can taste the beak, eh?
tallbirdegg_cracked.trans: 你可以尝出鸟嘴的味道，对吗？

announce_revived_from_corpse.en: Lucy'll never let me live that down.
announce_revived_from_corpse.trans: 露西绝不会让我沉睡那么久的。

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_found_last_o.en: Think that's the last one, eh?
announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_found_last_o.trans: 应该是最后一只了吧，诶？

announce_hunt_wrong_fork.en: I can feel some beastie's beady eyes on me.
announce_hunt_wrong_fork.trans: 我能感觉到有野兽在用眼珠子看我。

announce_ticoon_abandoned.en: How aboot we try this again some other time, eh?

1.en: Whew, I feel hotter than a forest fire.
1.trans: 呼，我感觉比森林大火还热。

2.en: Guess I shouldn't have touched that plant, eh?
2.trans: 看来应该碰那棵植物的，诶？

announce_nodangersiesta.trans: 没法午休，有东西在追我。

9.en: I'm more of a chopper than a lifter...
9.trans: 我比较擅长砍东西，而不是扛东西...

announce_pocketwatch_portal.en: Looks like I'm still in one piece.

announce_yoth_oncooldown.en: The horses must be busy now, Luce.
announce_yoth_oncooldown.trans: 马儿们兴许是忙着呢，露西。

1.en: Seems like its sense of direction isn't the greatest, eh Lucy?
1.trans: 看来它的方向感不行，对不，露西？

2.en: How aboot you try going the other way?

announce_attach_buff_sleepresistance.en: This stuff will wake you right up!
announce_attach_buff_sleepresistance.trans: 这东西会让你马上醒过来！

announce_shelter.en: Thanks for the shelter, buddy. I'm still gonna chop you.
announce_shelter.trans: 感谢你为我遮荫挡雨，伙计。但我还是要砍掉你。

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_found_one_mo.en: Let's see, there should only be one left.
announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_found_one_mo.trans: 好好找找，应该就剩一只了。

announce_bravery_potion.en: Glad that's over. Never thought I'd be scared of trees.
announce_bravery_potion.trans: 很高兴终于结束了。真没想到我会怕树。

announce_winters_feast_buff_over.en: Eh, I was probably a walkin' fire hazard anyway.
announce_winters_feast_buff_over.trans: 哎，反正那样亮着也是火险。

announce_lunarhail_bird_corpses.en: Kinda sad, but I still hate it.
announce_lunarhail_bird_corpses.trans: 有点难过，但我还是讨厌它们。

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_toofar.en: They wouldn't have cut and run this far.

announce_oceanfishing_linetooloose.en: Thick I'd better tighten the slack.

announce_crafting_fail.en: I can't do that right now.

announce_healingsalve_acidbuff_done.en: Looks like I'll be needin' another dose of Acid Repellent.
announce_healingsalve_acidbuff_done.trans: 看来我需要再涂点驱酸剂。

announce_canfix.en: I think I can fix this!

announce_compass_out.en: I'll always have the North in my heart.

prey.en: This here's the end for you!

generic.en: Get over here, eh!

pig.en: I'll make bacon of you yet!

announce_fan_out.en: I guess I'll just have to suffer now.
announce_fan_out.trans: 我猜现在我不得不忍受高温的折磨了。

announce_otterboat_outofshallows.en: Looks like this thing isn't cut out for deep seafaring.
announce_otterboat_outofshallows.trans: 看来这玩意儿不适合深海航行。

describe_plantstressornutrients.en: Might not be enough nutrients in the soil...

announce_nosleephaspermanentlight.en: Hey bud, I can't sleep when it's as bright as daylight.
announce_nosleephaspermanentlight.trans: 嘿，伙计，亮的跟白天一样，我睡不了。

announce_mount_lowhealth.en: This beast looks in a bad way, eh.
announce_mount_lowhealth.trans: 这个野兽看起来很糟糕，呃。

announce_hunt_lost_trail.en: I'm more of a woodsman than a hunter anyway.
announce_hunt_lost_trail.trans: 不管怎样，我更擅长伐木，而不是狩猎。

announce_boat_leak.en: All this water is making me very anxious.
announce_boat_leak.trans: 这么多水，弄得我很着急。

announce_shadow_rift_max.en: I don't like the look of that light.
announce_shadow_rift_max.trans: 我不喜欢那个光的样子。

announce_kitcoon_hideandseek_start.en: Better hide quick, eh? Here I come!

announce_attach_buff_workeffectiveness.en: Time to roll up our sleeves, eh Lucy?
announce_attach_buff_workeffectiveness.trans: 是时候卷起袖子干活了，对吧，露西？

announce_winch_claw_no_item.en: Whoops. Guess I was a little off, eh?
announce_winch_claw_no_item.trans: 哎呦。我又差了一点点，对不？

announce_tool_tooweak.en: Guess this tool just ain't gonna cut it.

describe_plantverystressed.en: There's a lot going wrong with this plant.
describe_plantverystressed.trans: 这株植物出了很多问题。

announce_cant_escape_curse.en: It's stickin' to me like tree sap!
announce_cant_escape_curse.trans: 它像树液一样粘在了我身上！

announce_yotd_noboats.en: Better scooch a bit closer to the starting point, eh?
announce_yotd_noboats.trans: 最好离起点再近一点，诶？

announce_nodaysleep.en: Only a hoser sleeps during the day.
announce_nodaysleep.trans: 只有失败者才在白天睡觉。

announce_detach_buff_playerabsorption.en: Anyone got a spare hockey helmet?
announce_detach_buff_playerabsorption.trans: 有多余的曲棍球头盔吗？

announce_detach_buff_moistureimmunity.en: I can feel the dampness creepin' back in.
announce_detach_buff_moistureimmunity.trans: 能感觉到潮气一点点回来了。

announce_archive_old_knowledge.en: Guess I knew that one already.

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_toofar_retur.en: Yep, this looks more like the kinda place they'd hide.
announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_toofar_retur.trans: 这里像是它们会藏的地方。

announce_hunt_start_fork.en: Well there's a trail to trouble, eh Luce?
announce_hunt_start_fork.trans: 这有一条通往麻烦的踪迹， 诶，露西？

announce_archive_no_power.en: Well, that one's gonna stay a mystery for a while longer.
announce_archive_no_power.trans: 哈，那玩意可能要保持一段时间的神秘了。

announce_monkey_curse_change.en: Why does this kinda thing keep happening to me?
announce_monkey_curse_change.trans: 为什么这种事情总是发生在我身上？

announce_oceanfishing_badcast.en: Yeesh, I look like a real hoser right now.
announce_oceanfishing_badcast.trans: 咦，我刚刚就跟个傻子一样。

announce_nowardrobeonfire.en: That's okay. I just need a good flannel, anyway.
announce_nowardrobeonfire.trans: 没关系。反正我只要有一件不错的法兰绒衬衫就够了。

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_losegame.en: Looks like I lost this one.

announce_detach_buff_attack.en: Sorry, all the fight's gone out of me.

announce_scrapbook_full.en: Looks like stuff I already know aboot.
announce_scrapbook_full.trans: 看起来像是我已经知道的东西。

announce_kitcoon_found_in_the_wild.en: Would you look at that! How long have you been hiding there, eh?
announce_kitcoon_found_in_the_wild.trans: 快看！你躲在那里多久了，诶？

announce_nomountedgift.en: I'd rather open that with my feet on the ground.
announce_nomountedgift.trans: 我宁愿脚踏实地地打开那个。

announce_attach_buff_moistureimmunity.en: I could stand under Niagara Falls and stay dry!
announce_attach_buff_moistureimmunity.trans: 就算站在尼亚加拉大瀑布下面，我也不会打湿衣服。

announce_weapon_tooweak.trans: 我们需要更强的武器，诶？

announce_carrat_error_stunned.en: We shoulda worked more on those reflexes, eh?
announce_carrat_error_stunned.trans: 我们反应没训练好，对吧？

announce_klaus_enrage.en: I think it's time to run.

announce_ruins_reset.en: All that hard work gone to waste.
announce_ruins_reset.trans: 所有努力都白白浪费了。

announce_archive_new_knowledge.en: It's fillin' my head with ideas!
announce_archive_new_knowledge.trans: 它把好多主意塞进了我的脑袋！

announce_attach_buff_electricattack.en: Careful you don't get zapped, eh!

announce_monkey_curse_changeback.en: Whew. Next time I'm turning into something normal, like a moose.
announce_monkey_curse_changeback.trans: 呜呼。下一次我要变个正常的东西，比如一只驼鹿。

no_ingredients.en: Dangit, I'm missing a few things.
no_ingredients.trans: 倒霉啊，俺手头东西不够。

no_station.en: I'm gonna need a proper workstation.
no_station.trans: 得有个像样的工作站才行。

no_tech.en: That one might take some lookin' into.

describe_smoldering.en: It's aboot to go up in flames, eh?

announce_monkey_curse_1.en: Uh-oh. This is a familiar feelin'...
announce_monkey_curse_1.trans: 啊噢。又是那个熟悉的感觉……

describe_plantstressorfamily.en: Maybe if I put some similar plants around...
describe_plantstressorfamily.trans: 我要不试着放几颗一样的植物在周围……

announce_winters_feast_buff.en: I'm lit up like the first of July!
announce_winters_feast_buff.trans: 我像7月1日一样华灯璀璨！

announce_reviving_corpse.en: You fell like a tree, eh?

announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_found_last_o.en: Looks like {name} found the last of them.
announce_kitcoon_hidandseek_found_last_o.trans: 应该是{name}找到了最后一只。

announce_ticoon_nothing_to_track.en: Looks like there ain't anything around.

announce_ghostdrain.en: I'm goin', like, nutso over here...

announce_oceanfishing_gotaway.en: Guess that one got away from me.

announce_inv_full.en: I can't carry any more kit.
announce_inv_full.trans: 我拿不了更多的东西了。

announce_attach_buff_attack.en: I feel strong as a grizzly bear!
announce_attach_buff_attack.trans: 我感觉像灰熊一样强壮！

describe_plantstressorseason.en: It just wasn't made for this kind of season.

announce_hunt_avoid_fork.en: This trail looks like a skate in the park.
announce_hunt_avoid_fork.trans: 这条踪迹看起来像是公园里的滑板道。

announce_exit_gelblob.en: I think some got in my mouth!
announce_exit_gelblob.trans: 我觉得有些东西进了我嘴里！

announce_ticoon_start_tracking.en: Let's get to finding those kits, eh?
announce_ticoon_start_tracking.trans: 咱们去找那些猫咪吧，诶？

announce_wet.trans: 格子衣服就算湿了，也还是暖和的。

announce_yotd_notenoughboats.en: I should clear the start area for any other boats. It's only polite.
announce_yotd_notenoughboats.trans: 我应该为其他船清空起点区域。这是基本礼貌。

announce_adventurefail.en: Oh well. I gave it a good try.
announce_adventurefail.trans: 唉，好吧。至少我尝试过了。

announce_washed_ashore.en: Well, that'll wake you up. Brr.

1.en: We better hightail it out of here.

3.en: There'll be trouble if we don't leave.
3.trans: 我们再不走就有麻烦了。

announce_kitcoon_hideandseek_join.en: Looks like fun! Mind if I cut in?

announce_townportalteleport.en: I got sand in my beard.

announce_ticoon_dead.en: Well that's a shame. Guess I'm on my own now.
announce_ticoon_dead.trans: 哎，可惜了。那我就自己来呗。

stale.en: I got to that one just in time.

invalid.en: I don't think my teeth could cut through that.
invalid.trans: 我的牙齿应该咬不动那个。

yucky.en: I'd rather chew on blubber balls.

painful.en: That was past the expiry date.

spoiled.en: That was a wee bit manky.

generic.en: Tasty!

announce_pirates_arrive.en: Hang on Lucy, it sounds like we've got company.
announce_pirates_arrive.trans: 坚持住，露西，听起来我们有同伴了。

announce_attach_buff_playerabsorption.en: I'm feelin' a heckuva lot tougher now!

announce_ticoon_waiting_for_leader.en: I think he's waiting for me.

announce_eyeofterror_flyback.en: I'll cut you down for good this time!
announce_eyeofterror_flyback.trans: 我这回非把你砍倒不可！

announce_ticoon_lost_kitcoon.trans: 倒霉啊。看来失去了线索。

announce_carrat_error_walking.en: You've gotta move faster than that!

announce_off_script.en: That didn't seem like part of the play...

announce_eyeofterror_flyaway.en: Daylight's too much for that big ol' eye, eh?
announce_eyeofterror_flyaway.trans: 那么大一眼睛还见不了日光，诶？

announce_nopumpkincarvingonfire.en: Aw. That was my best one yet.
announce_nopumpkincarvingonfire.trans: 嗷，那是我雕的最好的一个。

announce_nohungersiesta.en: My belly is rumbling. I'd never be able to relax.
announce_nohungersiesta.trans: 我的肚子已经咕咕叫了。饿得我没法放松睡觉。

1.en: So... what do plants like to talk aboot?
1.trans: 那么……植物喜欢聊什么呢？

2.en: How are you doing there, bud?

3.en: Let me know if any of these other plants are botherin' you - I'll give 'em the axe!
3.trans: 如果有其他的植物欺负你，你跟我说，我上去就是一斧头！

4.en: You grow here often? Aw, c'mon Lucy that was funny!
4.trans: 你经常在这里生长？噢，拜托，露西，这个笑话可以的！

5.en: It's nice catching up with my best bud!
5.trans: 很高兴能和我最好的朋友见面!

announce_hunt_lost_trail_spring.trans: 动物的踪迹已经被雨冲掉了。

announce_eating_not_feasting.en: I wouldn't feel good aboot keeping this all to myself.

announce_ticoon_get_leader_attention.en: Looks like he's trying to get my attention.
announce_ticoon_get_leader_attention.trans: 他好像想引起我的注意。

announce_snowball_no_snow.en: We need to find more snow.

seed_reveal.trans: 看！我这两手不错吧，兄弟？

seed_low.en: Hang on, I'll get you out.
seed_low.trans: 坚持住，我会弄你出来的。

glass_low.en: Hang on, I'll get you out.
glass_low.trans: 坚持住，我会弄你出来的。

idol_reveal.trans: 看！我这两手不错吧，兄弟？

glass_reveal.trans: 看！我这两手不错吧，兄弟？

idol_low.en: Hang on, I'll get you out.
idol_low.trans: 坚持住，我会弄你出来的。

announce_nodangergift.en: Now's definitely the wrong time to be celebratin' Christmas.
announce_nodangergift.trans: 现在绝对不是庆祝圣诞节的时候。

announce_otterboat_denbroken.en: Shoulda known breaking that den was a bad idea.
announce_otterboat_denbroken.trans: 早知道就不砸那个窝了。

announce_worms.en: Oh geez. I hope you're ready, Lucy.
announce_worms.trans: 哦，天啊。我希望你准备好了，露西。

announce_nodangersleep.en: It's too scary out to sleep.

describe_plantstressormoisture.en: It could use some more water, eh?
